Bitcoin-udsalget fortsætter – KITE bryder markedets nedgang med 10% gevinst
content: Bitcoin (BTC)-prisen fortsatte sin weekendnedgang i dag og faldt under vigtige støtteniveauer, da tradere indtog en defensiv holdning forud for centrale økonomiske data, der offentliggøres i denne uge. Kryptomarkedet fulgte Bitcoins føring og faldt cirka 2% i de sidste 24 timer til et to-ugers lavt niveau under $2.65 trillion. Samtidig tilføjede en bølge af likvidationer sent i de amerikanske timer søndag yderligere brændstof til udsalget. Markedsstemningen er forværret over de seneste 48 timer, hvor kryptomarkedets frygt- og grådighedsindeks er faldet 5 point siden 16. maj. De fleste større altcoins forblev afdæmpede i løbet af dagen, med gevinster begrænset til kun et par undtagelser. Hvorfor falder Bitcoin-prisen? Bitcoin og det bredere kryptomarked er i dag blevet påvirket af en række makroøkonomiske faktorer. For det første reagerede tradere hurtigt på stigende renter, efterhånden som globale obligationsrenter steg. I USA steg renten på statsobligationer, efterhånden som vedholdende inflationsdata holdt pengepolitikken stram. Et lignende scenarie er også udspillet i Japan, hvor obligationsrenter nåede flerårige højder. Samtidig har de globale obligationsrenter udøvet et nedadgående pres på ikke-afkastgivende aktiver. Alt i alt har den mere stramme pengepolitiske holdning markant reduceret sandsynligheden for en kommende rentenedsættelse på kort sigt. Ifølge CME FedWatch-værktøjet ligger sandsynligheden for, at Federal Reserve holder renten uændret, på 99,2%. På denne baggrund er den institutionelle efterspørgsel på tværs af større ETF'er for førende kryptovalutaer som Bitcoin og Ethereum aftaget. Specifikt har Bitcoin-ETF'er oplevet nettoudstrømninger på over $1 milliard i løbet af den seneste uge. Bitcoin har mistet et vigtigt psykologisk niveau Tradere reagerer også på, at Bitcoin mistede $80.000-niveauet, som blev set som vigtigt for at opretholde den opadgående momentum, der var til stede før torsdagens markup-afstemning om CLARITY Act. Da Bitcoin-prisen faldt under $80.000, blev overbelånte long-positioner tvangslukket, hvilket førte til en kaskade af likvidationer. Ifølge CoinGlass-data blev over $670 millioner udryddet og likvideret i de seneste 24 timer, hvor Bitcoin og Ethereum tegnede sig for størstedelen af tabene. Krypto-likvidationer - 24 timer. Kilde: Coinglass. Long-positioner i Bitcoin tegnede sig for cirka $200 millioner, mens long-positioner i Ethereum udgjorde over $264 millioner af det samlede beløb. Tradere...

title: Трампов десант на Гренланд - ново "не" Гренланђана и покушај Американаца да остану заувек
content: "Не", кратко је рекао гренландски премијер Јенс-Фредерик Нилсен, одговарајући на питање да ли је састанак са специјалним изаслаником Беле куће Џефом Лондријем отворио врата каквој опипљивијој сарадњи Гренланда са Вашингтоном. Лондри и амбасадор САД у Данској, Кен Ховери састали су се са званичницима гренландских и данских власти недуго пошто је Вашингтон обзнанио листу жеља везаних за будућност овог острва, укључујући снажније и неограничено присуство америчких војника, утицај на евентуалне будуће стране инвестиције и, на концу, експлоатацију ретких минерала. "Блиц" америчких дипломата и ново "не" Гренланђана Америчка делегација, у којој се налазио и лекар, стигла је на Гренланд без позива данских или локалних власти, па се на аеродрому у Нуку окупила само група радозналих становника, који су данским медијима рекли да им је "доста америчких тежњи да преузму" ово острво. "Спремни смо за сарадњу. Можемо разговарати и о војној сарадњи, али границе Гренланда мора бити поштоване", рекао је гренландски премијер. Питање америчког војног присуства на Гренланду поново се нашло у центру пажње, пошто је на острво, такође ненадано, стигао официр маринаца, који је проверио стање у којем се налазе ваздухопловна база из Другог светског рата, лука и објекти у које би Американци могли бити смештени. Према новом америчком плану, који је први објавио Њујорк тајмс , Гренланд је део шире стратегије контроле Арктика, који топљењем леда, добија сасвим ниви геостратешки значај. Битка за контролу северног пута Овакав развој ситуације изазвао је кинески брод "Истанбул бриџ ", који је почетком јануара пловећи арктичком рутом, прешао 7.400 километара од Кине до Велике Британије за 20 дана, драматично скраћујући време потребно за транспорт робе од Далеког истока до Европе. Глобално загревање је отворило могућност да арктичка рута, која пролази поред Гренланда, постане "Суецки канал 21. века", а амерички председник Доналд Трамп је одмах затим подигао узбуну због наводне "најезде кинеских бродова". Други део америчког плана односи се на успостављање радарских база и распоређивање војника на Гренланду, што би, у комбинацији са сличним присуством на Аљасци и у Канади, Американцима донело контролу над Северним полом. Американци тврде да им појачано присуство на Гренланду гарантује споразум који су потписали 1951. године, у време када је Гренлад још увек био данска колонија. Од јануара, када је Трамп запретио да ће окупирати ово острво, две стране су одржале укупно шест састанака....

title: La vente de Bitcoin se poursuit, KITE résiste au marché baissier avec +10%
content: Le prix du Bitcoin (BTC) a poursuivi sa baisse entamée ce week-end, passant sous des niveaux de support clés, les traders adoptant une posture défensive avant la publication de données économiques majeures cette semaine. Le marché crypto a suivi Bitcoin et a reculé d'environ 2% sur les dernières 24 heures, atteignant un creux de deux semaines sous $2.65 trillion. Par ailleurs, une vague de liquidations en fin de séance américaine dimanche a alimenté davantage la pression vendeuse. Le sentiment du marché s'est détérioré au cours des dernières 48 heures, l'indice Crypto Fear & Greed ayant perdu 5 points depuis May 16. La plupart des altcoins majeurs sont restés en retrait toute la journée, les gains se limitant à quelques exceptions. Why is Bitcoin price going down? Bitcoin et le marché crypto au sens large ont été impactés aujourd'hui par plusieurs facteurs macroéconomiques. Tout d'abord, les traders ont rapidement réagi à la montée des taux d'intérêt alors que les rendements obligataires mondiaux ont rebondi. Aux États-Unis, les rendements du Trésor ont légèrement progressé alors que des données d'inflation persistante maintiennent une politique monétaire restrictive. Un scénario similaire s'est également produit au Japon, où les rendements des obligations d'État ont atteint des plus hauts pluriannuels. Dans le même temps, la remontée des rendements obligataires mondiaux a exercé une pression à la baisse sur les actifs ne générant pas de rendement. Toute cette dynamique « hawkish » a sensiblement réduit les chances d'une baisse des taux à court terme. Selon l'outil CME FedWatch, la probabilité que la Réserve fédérale maintienne les taux inchangés s'établit à 99,2%. Dans ce contexte, la demande institutionnelle au travers des principaux ETF pour des crypto-monnaies majeures comme Bitcoin et Ethereum s'est ralentie. Les ETF Bitcoin ont notamment enregistré des sorties nettes de plus d'un milliard de dollars au cours de la semaine passée. Bitcoin has lost a key psychological level Les traders réagissent également à la perte par Bitcoin du niveau des $80,000, perçu comme crucial pour maintenir l'élan haussier observé avant le vote de markup sur le CLARITY Act jeudi. Lorsque le prix du Bitcoin est passé sous $80,000, des positions longues surlevées ont été fermées de force, entraînant une cascade de liquidations. Selon les données de CoinGlass, plus de $670 million ont été anéantis et...

title: ಪ್ರತ್ಯೇಕ ಘಟನೆ: ಎಸಿ ಹಾಕೊಂಡು ಮಗಿದ್ದಲ್ಲೇ ವ್ಯಕ್ತಿ ಸಾವು; ಅಪಘಾತದಲ್ಲಿ ತಾಯಿ-ಮಗಳು ದುರ್ಮರಣ
content: ತುಮಕೂರು, ಮೇ 18: ಭೀಕರ ರಸ್ತೆ ಅಪಘಾತದಲ್ಲಿ (accident) ತಾಯಿ ಮತ್ತು ಮಗಳು ಸ್ಥಳದಲ್ಲೇ ಸಾವನ್ನಪ್ಪಿರುವ (death) ದಾರುಣ ಘಟನೆ ತುಮಕೂರು ಜಿಲ್ಲೆಯ ಕುಣಿಗಲ್ ತಾಲ್ಲೂಕಿನ ರಾಷ್ಟ್ರೀಯ ಹೆದ್ದಾರಿ 75ರಲ್ಲಿ ಸಂಭವಿಸಿದೆ. ಮೃತ ದುರ್ದೈವಿಗಳನ್ನು ಬೆಂಗಳೂರು ನಿವಾಸಿಗಳಾದ ಜಯಮಾಲಾ (60) ಮತ್ತು ರಾಜೇಶ್ವರಿ (40) ಎಂದು ಗುರುತಿಸಲಾಗಿದೆ. ಮೂಲತಃ ರಾಯಚೂರು ಜಿಲ್ಲೆಯವರಾದ ಜಯಮಾಲಾ ಅವರು ಹಲವು ವರ್ಷಗಳಿಂದ ಮಗಳು ರಾಜೇಶ್ವರಿಯೊಂದಿಗೆ ಬೆಂಗಳೂರಿನಲ್ಲಿ ವಾಸವಿದ್ದರು. ಕುಣಿಗಲ್ ಪೊಲೀಸ್ ಠಾಣೆಯಲ್ಲಿ ಪ್ರಕರಣ ದಾಖಲಾಗಿದೆ. ಮುಖ್ಯಾಂಶಗಳು ತುಮಕೂರಿನಲ್ಲಿ ಭೀಕರ ಅಪಘಾತಕ್ಕೆ ತಾಯಿ-ಮಗಳು ಸಾವು AC ಹಾಕಿ ಕಾರಿನಲ್ಲಿ ಮಲಗಿದ್ದ ಚಾಲಕ ಸಾವು ಗುಡುಗು ಸಿಡಿಲಿನ ಅಬ್ಬರಕ್ಕೆ ಹೃದಯಾಘಾತ: ಶಿಕ್ಷಕ ಸಾವು ನಡೆದಿದ್ದೇನು? ರಾಜೇಶ್ವರಿ ತಮ್ಮ ಮಗ ಪ್ರೀತಮ್‌ನನ್ನು ಶ್ರವಣಬೆಳಗೊಳದ ಶಾಲೆಗೆ ಸೇರಿಸಲು ಕಾರಿನಲ್ಲಿ ತೆರಳುತ್ತಿದ್ದರು. ಜೊತೆಗೆ ತಾಯಿ ಜಯಮಾಲಾ ಕೂಡ ಇದ್ದರು. ಕುಣಿಗಲ್ ತಾಲ್ಲೂಕಿನ ಉರ್ಕೆಹಳ್ಳಿ ಬಳಿ ಕಾರು ಚಾಲಕನ ನಿಯಂತ್ರಣ ತಪ್ಪಿ ರಸ್ತೆ ವಿಭಜಕಕ್ಕೆ ಡಿಕ್ಕಿ ಹೊಡೆದಿದೆ. ಡಿಕ್ಕಿಯ ರಭಸಕ್ಕೆ ಜಯಮಾಲಾ ಹಾಗೂ ರಾಜೇಶ್ವರಿ ಸ್ಥಳದಲ್ಲೇ ಕೊನೆಯುಸಿರೆಳೆದಿದ್ದಾರೆ. ಕಾರು ಚಾಲಕ ಮಾರುತಿ ಹಾಗೂ ರಾಜೇಶ್ವರಿ ಮಗ ಪ್ರೀತಮ್ ಗಂಭೀರವಾಗಿ ಗಾಯಗೊಂಡಿದ್ದು, ಅವರನ್ನು ಸಮೀಪದ ಆಸ್ಪತ್ರೆಗೆ ದಾಖಲಿಸಲಾಗಿದೆ. ಸದ್ಯ ಸ್ಥಳಕ್ಕೆ ಕುಣಿಗಲ್ ಪೊಲೀಸರು ಭೇಟಿ ನೀಡಿ ಪರಿಶೀಲನೆ ಮಾಡಿದ್ದಾರೆ. AC ಹಾಕಿಕೊಂಡು ಕಾರಿನಲ್ಲಿ ಮಲಗಿದ್ದ ಚಾಲಕ ಸಾವು ಗ್ಲಾಸ್ ಏರಿಸಿಕೊಂಡು ಎಸಿ ಹಾಕಿಕೊಂಡು ಕಾರಿನಲ್ಲಿ ಮಲಗಿದ್ದ ಚಾಲಕ ಸಾವನ್ನಪ್ಪಿರುವಂತಹ ಘಟನೆ ಬೆಂಗಳೂರಿನ ಪೀಣ್ಯ ಬಳಿ ನೆಲಗೆದರಹಳ್ಳಿಯಲ್ಲಿ ನಡೆದಿದೆ. ಇಂದು ಬೆಳಗ್ಗೆ ಸುಮಾರು 10 ಗಂಟೆಗೆ ಖಾಸಗಿ ಕಂಪನಿಯೊಂದರ ಕಾರು ಚಾಲಕ ರಸ್ತೆ ಪಕ್ಕ ಕಾರು ನಿಲ್ಲಿಸಿ, ಎಲ್ಲಾ ಕಿಟಕಿಗಳನ್ನು ಏರಿಸಿ AC ಹಾಕಿಕೊಂಡು ಮಲಗಿದ್ದರು. ತುಂಬಾ ಹೊತ್ತು ಕಾರು ಅದೇ ಸ್ಥಳದಲ್ಲಿ ನಿಂತಿದ್ದರಿಂದ ಅನುಮಾನಗೊಂಡ ಸಾರ್ವಜನಿಕರು ಕಾರಿನ ಬಳಿ ಹೋಗಿ ಪರಿಶೀಲಿಸಿದ್ದಾರೆ. ಚಾಲಕ ಯಾವುದೇ ಪ್ರತಿಕ್ರಿಯೆ ನೀಡದಿದ್ದಾಗ ಕಲ್ಲಿನಿಂದ ಕಿಟಕಿ ಗಾಜು ಒಡೆದು ನೋಡಿದಾಗ, ಕಾರಿನೊಳಗೆ ಚಾಲಕ ಮೃತಪಟ್ಟಿರುವುದು ಪತ್ತೆಯಾಗಿದೆ. ತಕ್ಷಣ ಪೀಣ್ಯ ಪೊಲೀಸರಿಗೆ ಮಾಹಿತಿ ನೀಡಲಾಗಿದೆ. ಸಿಡಿಲಿನ ಅಬ್ಬರಕ್ಕೆ ಹೃದಯಾಘಾತವಾಗಿ ಶಿಕ್ಷಕ ಸಾವು ಸಿಡಿಲಿನ ಅಬ್ಬರಕ್ಕೆ ಹೃದಯಾಘಾತವಾಗಿ ಶಿಕ್ಷಕ ಸಾವನ್ನಪ್ಪಿರುವಂತಹ ಘಟನೆ ದಾವಣಗೆರೆ ಜಿಲ್ಲೆಯ ಹೊನ್ನಾಳಿ ತಾಲೂಕಿನ‌ ಮಲೆಕುಂಬಳೂರು ಗ್ರಾಮದಲ್ಲಿ ನಡೆದಿದೆ. ಸರ್ಕಾರಿ ಶಾಲೆಯ ಮುಖ್ಯ ಶಿಕ್ಷಕ ನಾಗರಾಜಪ್ಪ(56) ಮೃತ ದುರ್ದೈವಿ. ಮನೆ ಮುಂದೆ ನಿಂತಿದ್ದಾಗ ಸಿಡಿಲಿನ ಶಬ್ದಕ್ಕೆ ಹೃದಯಾಘಾತವಾಗಿ ಸ್ಥಳದಲ್ಲೇ ಮೃತಪಟ್ಟಿದ್ದಾರೆ. ಹೊನ್ನಾಳಿ ಪೊಲೀಸ್ ಠಾಣಾ ವ್ಯಾಪ್ತಿಯಲ್ಲಿ ಪ್ರಕರಣ ದಾಖಲಾಗಿದೆ. ಖಾಸಗಿ ಬಸ್ ಡಿಕ್ಕಿಯಾಗಿ ಗೂಡ್ಸ್ ಆಟೋ ಚಾಲಕ ಸಾವು ಖಾಸಗಿ ಬಸ್ ಡಿಕ್ಕಿಯಾಗಿ ಗೂಡ್ಸ್ ಆಟೋ ಚಾಲಕ ಸಾವನ್ನಪ್ಪಿರುವಂತಹ ಘಟನೆ ಕೋಲಾರ ತಾಲೂಕಿನ ಸಿಂಗೇಹಳ್ಳಿ ಗೇಟ್ ಬಳಿ ನಡೆದಿದೆ. ಆಂಧ್ರಪ್ರದೇಶ ಮೂಲದ ರಾಮುಡು ಮೃತ ಆಟೋ ಚಾಲಕ. ಕೋಲಾರದಲ್ಲಿ ಬಿಸ್ಕತ್ ತುಂಬಿಕೊಂಡು ಆಂಧ್ರಕ್ಕೆ ತೆರಳುತ್ತಿದ್ದ ಗೂಡ್ಸ್ ಆಟೋಗೆ ಖಾಸಗಿ ಬಸ್ ಡಿಕ್ಕಿ ಹೊಡೆದಿದೆ. ಡಿಕ್ಕಿ ರಭಸಕ್ಕೆ ಆಟೋ ಚಾಲಕ ಸ್ಥಳದಲ್ಲೇ ಸಾವನ್ನಪ್ಪಿದ್ದಾರೆ. ಅಪಘಾತದ ದೃಶ್ಯ ಬಸ್​ನಲ್ಲಿ ಅಳವಡಿಸಿದ್ದ ಕ್ಯಾಮರಾದಲ್ಲಿ ಸೆರೆ ಆಗಿದೆ. ಸದ್ಯ ವೇಮಗಲ್ ಪೊಲೀಸ್ ಠಾಣಾ ವ್ಯಾಪ್ತಿಯಲ್ಲಿ ಪ್ರಕರಣ ದಾಖಲಾಗಿದೆ. ಕರ್ನಾಟಕದ ಮತ್ತಷ್ಟು ಸುದ್ದಿಗಳನ್ನು ಓದಲು ಇಲ್ಲಿ ಕ್ಲಿಕ್ ಮಾಡಿ.

title: Regresa a la Casa Blanca después de 13 años: Real Madrid llega a un acuerdo verbal con José Mourinho
content: Es prácticamente un hecho: José Mourinho será el entrenador del Real Madrid la próxima temporada. Hay acuerdo verbal con el portugués para que se ponga el buzo merengue. Diversos medios europeos informan que Mou ya conversó sus condiciones con Florentino Pérez para regresar a la banca de la que salió en 2013 tras un exitoso paso, donde ganó una Liga, una Supercopa de España y una Copa del Rey. De acuerdo a medios españoles, el luso puso varias condiciones para arreglar su llegada. Por ejemplo, un contrato de dos años que le garantice estabilidad , lo que igualmente choca un poco por la necesidad de regresar a los títulos después de dos años sin ganar nada. Por otro lado, Mourinho pidió tener injerencia en los fichajes, irrumpiendo en una potestad que hasta hoy tienen solo el presidente y José Ángel Sánchez, el director general. La idea es sumar buenos nombres a la altura de Mesut Özil o Ángel Di María, quienes estuvieron en su primera etapa. Otro punto importante está relacionado con la preparación física. Uno de sus pedidos habría sido la salida de Antonio Pintus, considerado “el protegido” de Florentino Pérez. El profesional había salido del staff de Xabi Alonso y regresó en enero por decisión del club. En Madrid afirman que Mourinho llegará con sus habituales colaboradores: João Tralhão como segundo entrenador, Pedro Machado, Ricardo Formosinho, Ricardo Rocha como entrenadores asistentes y Roberto Merella y Rubén Soares como entrenadores-analistas. Su PF será António Dias y Nuno Gomes estará a cargo de la preparación de arqueros. Carvajal se despide En esta jornada, Dani Carvajal, multicampeón merengue, confirmó su alejamiento. “El Real Madrid C. F. y nuestro capitán Dani Carvajal han acordado poner fin a una etapa maravillosa como jugador de nuestro club al término de la presente temporada” , anunció la institución a través de un comunicado. “El Real Madrid quiere mostrarle su agradecimiento y todo su cariño a una de las más grandes leyendas de nuestro club y del fútbol mundial. Carvajal es uno de los cinco jugadores que a lo largo de toda la historia del fútbol han logrado ganar seis Copas de Europa , y ha formado parte de un equipo que ha protagonizado una de las épocas más brillantes de nuestra historia”, continuó. Asimismo, el elenco madridista enumeró los logros de su excapitán, quien llegó al equipo en 2002 y defendió la camiseta blanca durante 23 temporadas: 10 en la cantera y 13 en el...

title: Our Haute Guide to the Best Flip-Flops for Women and Men
content: Photo Credit: Manolo Blahnik It’s officially flip-flop season, so it’s time to let your feet breathe and bare your toes. Do away with your crusty old pair and opt for something chic. For women and men alike, we rounded up the best flip-flops to hit summer with stylish strides. Women Tkees x J.Crew Sandals First up, a collaboration that we didn’t see coming. Tkees and J.Crew teamed up for a preppy, perfect sandal. Shop Now, $95 Christopher Esber Flip-Flop Sandals PVC flip-flops are all the rage, and Christopher Esber seems to have coined it. Shop Now, $300 Monday Swimwear Yinny Flip-Flops You might love Monday for its swimsuits, but its footwear is not to be missed. With a glamorous gold hardware contrasting against the black leather, you can dress this pair up and down. Shop Now, $70 Britt Netta Flat Sandals Python print and mesh? Britt Netta has taken the classic flip-flop and made it a trend-forward shoe. Shop Now, $225 Marni Flip-Flops This bold, statement pair from Marni will more than suffice. Shop Now, $635 Soléi Sea Indie Flip-Flops Upon first glance, these might appear to be simple, sleek flip-flops, but Soléi Sea takes it one step further by adding arch support into the insole. Truly, they’re the most comfortable flip-flops I’ve ever owned. Shop Now, $59 Manolo Blahnik Paterno Sandals Not all flip-flops are equal. Manolo Blahnik dressed its pair up by giving it a slight heel, making it perfect for formalwear. Shop Now, $925 Rag & Bone Gracie Jelly Thong Sandals One more jelly pair, this time from Rag & Bone. While you might know the brand for its denim, its footwear featured OrthoLite foam insoles that make for extra comfort. Shop Now, $178 Margaux Seia Sandals Margaux channels easy elegance with a thong sandal that features a delicately woven upper. Pair with linen pants for a breezy summer outfit. Shop Now, $325 Men Brunello Cucinelli Thong Sandals With a striped green trim, these sandals exude quiet luxury—a Brunello Cucinelli specialty. Shop Now, $470 Auralee Thong Sandals Add a pop of color to your look with these blue leather flip-flops. Shop Now, $595 Todd Snyder Thong Sandal Todd Snyder is the master of timelessness, and these flip-flops prove it. You’ll wear these everyday for years to come. Shop Now, $298 Ralph Lauren Denim Flip-Flops Yes, denim flip-flops exist, and this pair from Ralph Lauren proves it. Shop Now, $195 REEF Draftsmen Flip-Flops And finally, a true and tried pair of flip-flops that have been gracing men’s feet since...

Wyprzedaż Bitcoina trwa, KITE przeciwstawia się bessie, rośnie o 10%
content: Cena Bitcoina (BTC) kontynuowała dziś weekendowy spadkowy trend, przebijając kluczowe poziomy wsparcia, gdy inwestorzy przyjęli defensywną postawę przed publikacją istotnych danych makroekonomicznych w tym tygodniu. Rynek kryptowalut poszedł w ślad za Bitcoinem i spadł o około 2% w ciągu ostatnich 24 godzin, osiągając dwutygodniowe minimum poniżej $2.65 trillion. Tymczasem fala likwidacji podczas późnych godzin amerykańskich w niedzielę dodała paliwa do wyprzedaży. Sentiment rynkowy pogorszył się w ciągu ostatnich 48 godzin, a wskaźnik strachu i chciwości w kryptowalutach spadł o 5 punktów od 16 maja. Większość głównych altcoinów pozostawała w ciągu dnia stłumiona, a wzrosty ograniczały się do zaledwie garstki wyjątków. Dlaczego cena Bitcoina spada? Bitcoin i szerszy rynek kryptowalut zostały dziś dotknięte kilkoma czynnikami makroekonomicznymi. Po pierwsze, inwestorzy szybko zareagowali na wzrost stóp procentowych, gdy globalne rentowności obligacji poszły w górę. W USA rentowności obligacji skarbowych wzrosły w reakcji na oporne dane inflacyjne, które utrzymują restrykcyjną politykę pieniężną. Podobny scenariusz rozegrał się w Japonii, gdzie rentowności obligacji rządowych osiągnęły wieloletnie maksima. Równocześnie globalne rentowności obligacji wywierały presję spadkową na aktywa niemające dochodu. Cała ta jastrzębia atmosfera znacząco zmniejszyła prawdopodobieństwo szybkiego cięcia stóp w najbliższym czasie. Zgodnie z narzędziem CME FedWatch, prawdopodobieństwo, że Rezerwa Federalna utrzyma stopy procentowe bez zmian, wynosi 99,2%. W takim otoczeniu popyt instytucjonalny w największych ETF-ach na wiodące kryptowaluty, takie jak Bitcoin i Ethereum, osłabł. Szczególnie ETF-y na Bitcoina odnotowały odpływy netto przekraczające $1 billion w ciągu ostatniego tygodnia. Bitcoin stracił kluczowy poziom psychologiczny Inwestorzy reagują także na utratę poziomu $80,000 przez Bitcoina, uznawanego za kluczowy dla utrzymania impetu wzrostowego obserwowanego przed czwartkowym głosowaniem nad poprawkami do CLARITY Act. Gdy cena Bitcoina spadła poniżej $80,000, dźwigniowane pozycje long zostały gwałtownie zamknięte, co doprowadziło do kaskady likwidacji. Z danych CoinGlass wynika, że w ciągu ostatnich 24 godzin skasowano i zlikwidowano ponad $670 million, przy czym większość strat przypadała na Bitcoina i Ethereum. Likwidacje kryptowalut – 24 godziny. Źródło: Coinglass. Pozycje long na...

Continúa la venta de Bitcoin; KITE desafía el mercado bajista con +10%
content: El precio de Bitcoin (BTC) continuó su tendencia bajista del fin de semana hoy, cayendo por debajo de niveles clave de soporte mientras los operadores adoptaban una postura defensiva ante datos económicos importantes que se publican esta semana. El mercado cripto siguió la pauta de Bitcoin y retrocedió aproximadamente un 2% en las últimas 24 horas, tocando un mínimo de dos semanas por debajo de $2.65 trillion. Mientras tanto, una ola de liquidaciones durante las últimas horas de la sesión estadounidense del domingo añadió más combustible a la venta. El sentimiento del mercado se ha deteriorado en las últimas 48 horas, con el índice de miedo y codicia cripto cayendo 5 puntos desde el 16 de mayo. La mayoría de las principales altcoins se mantuvieron apagadas durante el día, con ganancias limitadas a solo un puñado de excepciones. ¿Por qué baja el precio de Bitcoin? Bitcoin y el conjunto del mercado cripto se han visto afectados por varios factores macroeconómicos hoy. En primer lugar, los operadores reaccionaron rápidamente al aumento de las tasas de interés ante el salto de los rendimientos de los bonos a nivel global. En EE. UU., los rendimientos del Tesoro subieron a medida que los datos de inflación persistente mantuvieron la política monetaria en un tono restrictivo. Un escenario similar también se ha desarrollado en Japón, donde los rendimientos de los bonos gubernamentales marcaron máximos de varios años. Al mismo tiempo, los rendimientos de los bonos globales han ejercido presión a la baja sobre los activos que no generan rendimiento. Todo este sesgo restrictivo ha reducido significativamente las probabilidades de un recorte de tipos en el corto plazo. Según la herramienta CME FedWatch, las probabilidades de que la Reserva Federal mantenga las tasas sin cambios se sitúan en el 99.2%. En este contexto, la demanda institucional a través de los principales ETFs para criptomonedas líderes como Bitcoin y Ethereum se ha desacelerado. Los ETFs de Bitcoin, en particular, han registrado salidas netas de más de $1 billion durante la última semana. Bitcoin ha perdido un nivel psicológico clave Los operadores también están reaccionando a la pérdida por parte de Bitcoin del nivel de $80,000, que se consideraba clave para mantener el impulso alcista observado antes de la votación sobre la enmienda CLARITY Act del jueves. A medida que el precio de Bitcoin cayó por debajo de $80,000, las posiciones largas sobreapalancadas se...

Modric is a horvát vb-keretben
content: Zlatko Dalic szövetségi kapitány már korábban jelezte, számít arra, hogy a műtéten átesett 40 éves középpályás felépülése gyors lesz és pályára léphet a vb-n. A rekordot jelentő, 196 válogatottsággal rendelkező Modric 2018-ban ezüst-, legutóbb, 2022-ben pedig bronzérmet nyert a vb-n a horvát válogatottal. Mellette a szintén a tapasztaltabb játékosok közé tartozó, 37 éves Ivan Perisic is bekerült a 26-os keretbe. A horvátok először június 17-én lépnek pályára, az ellenfél Anglia lesz, a csoportban még Panama és Ghána szerepel. A horvát keret: kapusok: Dominik Livakovic (Dinamo Zagreb), Dominik Kotarski (Köbenhavn), Ivor Pandur (Hull City) védők: Josko Gvardiol (Manchester City), Duje Caleta-Car (Real Sociedad), Josip Sutalo (Ajax), Josip Stanisic (Bayern München), Marin Pongracic (Fiorentina), Martin Erlic (Midtjylland), Luka Vuskovic (Hamburg) középpályások: Luka Modric (AC Milan), Mateo Kovacic (Manchester City), Mario Pasalic (Atalanta), Nikola Vlasic (Torino), Luka Sucic (Real Sociedad), Martin Baturina (Como), Kristijan Jakic (Augsburg), Petar Sucic (Internazionale), Nikola Moro (Bologna), Toni Fruk (Rijeka) támadók: Ivan Perisic (PSV Eindhoven), Andrej Kramaric (Hoffenheim), Ante Budimir (Osasuna), Marco Pasalic (Orlando City), Petar Musa (Dallas), Igor Matanovic (Freiburg) A Modric is a horvát vb-keretben bejegyzés először Sport365 -én jelent meg.

Bitcoin-utförsäljning fortsätter – KITE trotsar björnmarknaden med 10% upp
content: Bitcoin (BTC) pris fortsatte sin nedåtgående helgtrend idag och föll under viktiga stödnivåer när handlare tog en defensiv hållning inför viktiga ekonomiska data som släpps denna vecka. Kryptomarknaden följde Bitcoins utveckling och sjönk med ungefär 2% under de senaste 24 timmarna till en tvåveckorslägstanivå under $2.65 trillion. Samtidigt tillförde en våg av likvidationer under sena amerikanska timmar på söndagen ytterligare bränsle till utförsäljningen. Marknadssentimentet har försämrats under de senaste 48 timmarna, där kryptons fear and greed-index sjunkit med 5 punkter sedan 16 maj. De flesta stora altcoins var dämpade under dagen, med uppgångar begränsade till endast ett fåtal undantag. Varför faller Bitcoin-priset? Bitcoin och den bredare kryptomarknaden har påverkats av flera makroekonomiska faktorer idag. För det första reagerade handlare snabbt på stigande räntor när globala obligationsräntor hoppade upp. I USA steg Treasury-räntorna när envis inflationsdata höll penningpolitiken restriktiv. En liknande situation har utkristalliserats i Japan, där statsobligationsräntorna nått fleraårshögder. Samtidigt har globala obligationsräntor utövat nedåttryck på icke-avkastande tillgångar. All denna hökaktiga stämning har kraftigt minskat sannolikheten för en snar räntesänkning. Enligt CME:s FedWatch-verktyg är oddsen för att Federal Reserve behåller räntorna oförändrade 99,2%. I detta klimat har den institutionella efterfrågan på stora ETF:er för ledande kryptovalutor som Bitcoin och Ethereum avtagit. Specifikt har Bitcoin-ETF:er sett nettoutflöden på över $1 miljard under den senaste veckan. Bitcoin har tappat en viktig psykologisk nivå Handlare reagerar också på att Bitcoin förlorade $80,000-nivån, som sågs som avgörande för att behålla uppåtmomentumet som fanns före torsdagens CLARITY Act-markupomröstning. När Bitcoin-priset föll under $80,000 stängdes överbelånade long-positioner kraftfullt, vilket ledde till en kaskad av likvidationer. Enligt CoinGlass-data försvann och likviderades över $670 miljoner under de senaste 24 timmarna, där Bitcoin och Ethereum stod för majoriteten av förlusterna. Krypto-likvidationer - 24 timmar. Källa: Coinglass. Bitcoin long-positioner stod för ungefär $200 miljoner, medan Ethereum long-positioner utgjorde över $264 miljoner av totalen. মমিনুলকে ছাড়িয়ে এককভাবে সর্বোচ্চ শতকের মালিক মুশফিক
content: বাংলাদেশের টেস্ট ক্রিকেটে নতুন ইতিহাস গড়লেন মুশফিকুর রহিম। এতদিন মুমিনুল হকর সঙ্গে যৌথভাবে সর্বোচ্চ ১৩টি টেস্ট শতকের মালিক ছিলেন তিনি। এবার পাকিস্তানের বিপক্ষে সেঞ্চুরি করে এককভাবে বাংলাদেশের সর্বোচ্চ টেস্ট শতকের রেকর্ড নিজের করে নিলেন অভিজ্ঞ এই ব্যাটার। সোমবার সিলেট টেস্টের দ্বিতীয় ইনিংসে ব্যাট করতে নেমে ক্যারিয়ারের ১৪তম টেস্ট শতক পূর্ণ করেন মুশফিক। দুর্দান্ত ধৈর্য আর অভিজ্ঞতার পরিচয় দিলেন তিনি আবারো। অন্যপ্রান্তে তাকে সঙ্গ দিচ্ছিলেন তাইজুল ইসলাম। শুধু টেস্ট শতকের রেকর্ডই নয়, এদিন আরও একটি অনন্য মাইলফলক স্পর্শ করেছেন মুশফিক। বাংলাদেশের প্রথম ক্রিকেটার হিসেবে আন্তর্জাতিক ক্রিকেটের তিন সংস্করণ মিলিয়ে ১৬ হাজার রান পূর্ণ করেছেন তিনি। বাংলাদেশের ক্রিকেটে এখন পর্যন্ত আর কোনো ব্যাটার এই উচ্চতায় পৌঁছাতে পারেননি। তালিকায় মুশফিকের পরেই আছেন তামিম ইকবাল। ৩৮৭ ম্যাচে তাঁর সংগ্রহ ১৫ হাজার ১৯২ রান। এর আগে বাংলাদেশের প্রথম ক্রিকেটার হিসেবে ১০০ টেস্ট খেলার কীর্তিও গড়েছিলেন মুশফিক। এবার সেই ইতিহাসের সঙ্গে যোগ হলো নতুন আরেকটি অধ্যায়।

PSG’s Dembele Undergoes Treatment For Leg Issue Before Champions League Final
content: Paris Saint-Germain forward Ousmane Dembele needs treatment for a right calf issue, the French club said Monday, ahead of the Champions League final against Arsenal later this month. The Ballon d’Or winner was substituted after half an hour during Sunday’s 2-1 Ligue 1 defeat against Paris FC “as a precaution after experiencing some discomfort in his right calf,” PSG said in a statement. “Dembele will be having treatment over the next few days,” the club added. The 29-year-old did not appear to be struggling when he left the field and boarded the team bus after the match without limping . Ousmane Dembele receives the Ligue 1 best player award during the 34th UNFP’s (France’s professional players union) French football awards ceremony in Paris on May 11, 2026. (Photo by Thomas SAMSON / AFP) READ ALSO: Dembele Scoops 2025 FIFA ‘The Best’ Men’s Player Award “I think it is just due to fatigue,” coach Luis Enrique told the press on Sunday. “It has been a tricky end to the season but now we have two weeks to prepare for the biggest match in our history.” The former Barcelona player has suffered numerous physical setbacks this season, particularly thigh and calf issues. Meanwhile, Achraf Hakimi resumed individual training on Saturday after a thigh problem, as did Willian Pacho, Nuno Mendes, and Lucas Chevalier. Ousmane Dembele after scoring a goal during the French L1 football match between RC Lens and Paris Saint-Germain (PSG) on May 13, 2026. (Photo by Francois LO PRESTI / AFP) All three were unavailable for Sunday’s match against Paris FC. PSG clinched a fifth straight French title, and a record-extending 14th overall, with a 2-0 win over nearest challengers Lens last Wednesday. Luis Enrique’s side face Arsenal in Budapest on May 30, when they will attempt to retain the European crown they won for the first time in the club’s history last season. AFP The post PSG’s Dembele Undergoes Treatment For Leg Issue Before Champions League Final appeared first on Channels Television .

La novedad de Shangai: China aseguró a los empresarios argentinos que no modificará el sistema de cupos a la importación de carne vacuna, lo que debería garantizar precios elevados
content: Arrancó la SIAL de Shangai, la exposición de la que participan 25 empresas exportadoras acompañadas por el Instituto de Promoción de la Carne Vacuna Argentina (IPCVA). Allí se juega buena parte de las exportaciones de carne argentina hacia su principal cliente. En la previa a la exposición, los directivos del IPCVA mantuvieron una reunión junto con funcionarios argentinos con las autoridades del Ministerio de Comercio de China, también conocido como Mofcom, que se encarga de formular y aplicar las políticas nacionales e internacionales de comercio, inversión extranjera y regulación del mercados. Georges Breitschmitt, presidente del IPCVA, contó luego: “Nos aseguraron que no van a cambiar los cupos a las importaciones de carne vacuna y que el esquema seguirá tal como está planteado por los próximos tres años, ya que con esto buscan acotar importaciones y mejorar el precio de la hacienda de sus productores”. Eso fue comunicado en la charla que tuvieron las partes, aunque no hubo un comunicación oficial ratificando una cuestión crucial para todo el comercio internacional de carne vacuna. China impuso a principios de 2026 una salvaguarda para defender a sus productores, estableciendo cupos por cada país que le vende ese alimento. Pero como Brasil y Australia, dos de sus principales proveedores, ya consumieron gran parte de sus tonelajes, corrió muy fuerte la versión de una ampliación de esos cupos. Tras la desmentida, lo que sí informaron los chinos es que Brasil ya cubrió el 50% de su cupo. El gobierno chino analiza la flexibilización de los cupos a sus importaciones de carne vacuna: Brasil y Australia ya cubrieron 50% de los suyos y serían los más beneficiados Que se mantengan los cupos tal como fueron definidos es una muy buena noticia para los exportadores argentinos y para toda la cadena de la carne vacuna, ya que garantiza que no ingresará más carne de Brasil a ese mercado. Al ritmo vertiginoso con que el vecino país y principal exportador mundial de carne viene consumiendo su cupo, se debería sentir un faltante de carne en el cierre del año y en la previa de los festejos por el año nuevo lunar. Este debería afirmar los valores en beneficio de otros países oferentes. En ese contexto mejorarían los precios de las exportaciones de la Argentina, que recibió una asignación de 700 mil toneladas res con hueso (unas 511 mil toneladas pesos producto) y de ese total exportó el 35%, bastante menos que sus competidores. വില കൂടിയ ജപ്പാന്‍കാരി 'മിയാസാക്കി' ഉള്‍പ്പെടെ നൂറിലേറെ ഇനങ്ങള്‍; വ്യത്യസ്തമായി മാമ്പഴ പ്രേമികളുടെ പ്രദര്‍ശന വിപണന മേള
content:
കോഴിക്കോട്: ലോകത്തിലെ തന്നെ ഏറ്റവും വിലപിടിപ്പുള്ള മാമ്പഴങ്ങള്‍ ഉള്‍പ്പെടെ എത്തിച്ച് ഒരു നാട്ടിലെ മാമ്പഴ പ്രേമികള്‍ നടത്തുന്ന പ്രദര്‍ശന മേള നാടിന്‍റെയാകെ പ്രശംസ പിടിച്ചുപറ്റി. മുക്കം കാരശ്ശേരിയിലാണ് 'മാങ്ങാ പ്രാന്തന്മാര്‍' എന്ന് സ്വയം വിശേഷിപ്പിക്കുന്ന മാമ്പഴ പ്രേമികളുടെയും കര്‍ഷകരുടെയും കൂട്ടായ്മ മാമ്പഴ പ്രദര്‍ശനം ഒരുക്കിയത്. കേരളത്തില്‍ വിളയിച്ചെടുത്ത നാട്ടുമാങ്ങയുടെ മധുരം മുതല്‍ ലോകത്തിലെ ഏറ്റവും വിലപിടിപ്പുള്ള വിദേശ ഇനങ്ങള്‍ ഉള്‍പ്പെടെ നൂറിലധികം ഇനങ്ങളുടെ പ്രദര്‍ശനവും രുചിമേളയുമാണ് ഇവര്‍ നാട്ടുകാര്‍ക്കായി സംഘടിപ്പിച്ചത്. ലോകത്തിലെ തന്നെ ഏറ്റവും വിലകൂടിയ ജാപ്പനീസ് മാമ്പഴമായ 'മിയാസാക്കി'യായിരുന്നു മേളയിലെ പ്രധാന താരം. കേരളത്തിലെ മണ്ണിലും മിയാസാക്കി നൂറുമേനി വിളയുമെന്ന് തെളിയിച്ച കര്‍ഷകര്‍ കൂടിയായിരുന്നു സംഘാടനത്തിന് പിന്നില്‍.

രാജ്യത്തെ വിവിധ സംസ്ഥാനങ്ങളില്‍ നിന്നുള്ള ഇനങ്ങളും അപൂര്‍വ്വ നാടന്‍ മാങ്ങകളും മേളയുടെ മാറ്റ് കൂട്ടി. കണ്ട് മടങ്ങാന്‍ മാത്രമല്ല, വന്നവര്‍ക്കെല്ലാം മാമ്പഴങ്ങള്‍ കഴിക്കാനും രുചിവൈവിധ്യങ്ങളെ കുറിച്ച് അഭിപ്രായം പറയാനുമുള്ള സൗകര്യവും ഇവിടെ ഒരുക്കിയിരുന്നു. തുടര്‍ച്ചയായ അഞ്ചാം വര്‍ഷമാണ് കാരശ്ശേരിയിലെ പൊയിലില്‍ വീട്ടില്‍ ഈ മാമ്പഴക്കൂട്ടായ്മ സംഘടിപ്പിക്കുന്നത്. പ്രകൃതിസ്‌നേഹിയും കര്‍ഷകനുമായ അബ്ദു പോയിലിലാണ് ഇത്തരത്തിലുള്ള ഒരു ആശയത്തിന് തുടക്കമിട്ടത്. തായ്ലന്‍ഡ് വെറൈറ്റികളായ റെഡ് ഐബറി, സൂപ്പര്‍ ക്വീന്‍, നാടന്‍ മാങ്ങകളായ കോട്ടൂര്‍ കോണം , കൊളംബ്, ചക്കരക്കട്ടി തുടങ്ങിയവയും പ്രദര്‍ശനത്തിന്റെ ഭാഗമായുണ്ട്. തിരുവമ്പാടി മണ്ഡലം നിയുക്ത എം.ല്‍.എ സി.കെ കാസിം മംഗോ ഫെസ്റ്റ് ഉദ്ഘാടനം ചെയ്തു.

XRP, Ethereum, or Solana? AI Picks Which Crypto Will 10x Faster
content: The post XRP, Ethereum, or Solana? AI Picks Which Crypto Will 10x Faster appeared first on 24/7 Wall St. . Quick Read XRP is back at $1.38 after failing to hold $1.50 post-CLARITY Act, Ethereum has slipped to $2,119 over the past week, and Solana trades at $84 after losing the $90 support level. ChatGPT says XRP has delivered 10x twice in Q2 2017 (1,109%) and Q4 2017 (1,064%), while Ethereum has delivered 10x once in Q1 2016 (1,121%), and Solana has reached 10x once in Q1 2021 (1,191%). XRP has the clearest historical path to 10x, but Solana and Ethereum can match it if Alpenglow and Glamsterdam both deliver on schedule. The analyst who called NVIDIA in 2010 just named his top 10 AI stocks. Get them here FREE . XRP ( CRYPTO: XRP ) trades at $1.38 after losing the $1.40 support level despite momentum from the CLARITY Act clearing the Senate Banking Committee. Meanwhile, Ethereum ( CRYPTO: ETH ) trades at $2,119, while Solana ( CRYPTO: SOL ) trades at $84 after losing the $90 support level. Crypto investors are asking which of these cryptos could hit 10x first. The answer depends on two things: each token’s historical performance during major bull cycles and how they respond to key catalysts. We analyzed the three altcoins to determine which of them could deliver 10x returns the fastest. What Fueled Previous 10x Moves for XRP, Ethereum, and Solana? ChatGPT’s analysis starts with each coin’s historical performance when they last reached 10x. Coin 10x Rally Period XRP 1,109%, 1,064% Q2 2017, Q4 2017 Ethereum 1,121% Q1 2016 Solana 1,191% Q1 2021 XRP had an explosive run in Q2 and Q4 of 2017 which was mainly influenced by a combination of retail demand for altcoins, expectations that crypto exchange was expanding which meant more market cap and eventually the bull run of 2017. Major exchange listings gave XRP wider visibility and accessibility, sustaining demand through quarters. Meanwhile, Ethereum’s price rally in 2016 was driven by projects using Ethereum’s network as the primary fund raising platform, which transformed the network from a beta blockchain to a core infrastructure layer. That development triggered a 1,121% boost, with ETH rallying from $0.93 to $11.40. On the other hand, Solana delivered a 1,191% gain in Q1 2021 as developers saw the network as a better alternative to Ethereum and executed projects on it due to its low gas fees and ability to accommodate high-volume DeFi activity. Ne zadržava se na jednom mestu, kreće se kroz šumu: Ovo je najveća zver koja živi u Srbiji
content: U Srbiјi prirodno živi mrki medved, naјveći evropski kopneni sisar i strogo zaštićena vrsta. Naјviše јe vezan za planinske i šumovite predele zapadne, јugozapadne i centralne Srbiјe. Naјpoznatiјa područјa gde se јavlja su Tara, Goliјa, Zlatibor, Zlatar, Pešter, Mokra Gora i Kopaonik, a prisustvo јe zabeleženo i u delovima istočne Srbiјe, poput Stare planine. Ipak, medved niјe životinja koјa se zadržava samo na јednom mestu. On koristi velike teritoriјe, kreće se kroz šume i planinske predele, a ponekad prelazi i između više država. View this post on Instagram A post shared by @srbiju_upoznaj Zato јe važno da znamo јedno: ako ga nekada ugledamo u prirodi, to niјe prizor za približavanje, hranjenje ili fotografisanje iz blizine. Medveda treba posmatrati sa poštovanjem i držati bezbednu distancu. Srbiјa јoš uvek ima divljinu. Samo јe pitanje da li znamo da јe sačuvamo. (Telegraf.rs/ Srbiju upoznaj )

Novo presidente da Anbima defende tempestividade nas reações, cita ‘casos isolados’ e diz que espera ‘evoluções positivas’ na CVM
content: Tempestividade e evolução da autorregulação foram as palavras mais repetidas por Roberto Paris, diretor-executivo do Bradesco e eleito novo presidente da Anbima, Associação Brasileira das Entidades dos Mercados Financeiro e de Capitais. Em cerimônia realizada nesta segunda-feira (18), em São Paulo, o executivo falou em “eventos recentes” e “casos isolados”, sem mencionar nominalmente os escândalos da Reag e do Banco Master, que a entidade vem buscando tratar como “eventos pontuais”. “Casos isolados não podem definir a percepção sobre o setor. Ao contrário, devem demonstrar o papel estrutural que o mercado de capitais tem na economia e na vida de todos os brasileiros”, defendeu Paris em seu discurso de posse. Em entrevista coletiva, o executivo voltou a reforçar essa visão. “A indústria de fundos e o mercado de capitais têm mais de R$ 11 trilhões sob gestão”, afirmou. “Pode parecer que todo o mercado de capitais está implicado por problemas pontuais que aconteceram em uma gestora ou outra, em um banco ou outro. [Mas] O mercado é muito grande.” Questionado por jornalistas especificamente sobre os casos Reag e Master, Paris afirmou que a Anbima vem trabalhando “para aperfeiçoar a autorregulação e tentando ter mais tempestividade” para reagir ao detectar “certas situações”. Ele ressalvou, porém, que a atuação da entidade tem suas limitações, dentro da autorregulação do mercado, e que outras ações cabem exclusivamente aos órgãos reguladores. “A gente não tem o poder de polícia, não tem o poder do regulador para tomar decisões mais drásticas.” Crise na CVM Paris também foi questionado pela reportagem sobre a situação de precarização atual da CVM (Comissão de Valores Mobiliários) – a entidade enfrenta perda de servidores especializados, defasagem salarial frente a outras carreiras regulatórias, restrições orçamentárias e crescente dificuldade de fiscalização do mercado. Um exemplo desta situação é o fato de a CVM ter apenas dois diretores titulares em exercício no momento, quando deveria ter 5 membros no Colegiado (1 presidente e 4 diretores). Em princípio, o executivo da Anbima respondeu que a CVM “como qualquer agente público nesse momento, tem suas dificuldades”. Pressionado novamente, Paris afirmou, então, que “todo mundo acompanha como está a situação da CVM” e disse esperar que a entidade “tenha evoluções positivas no longo prazo”. “Eu acho que tem ali a questão de ter poucos diretores...

South girls, Greenwood boys win region titles
content: South Warren claimed the girls’ team title and Greenwood’s boys’ squad won for a regional crown for the 13th straight season on Thursday in Region 4 tennis team tournament action. South Warren’s girls topped visiting Greenwood 3-1 for the team title. The Spartans’ No. 2 singles player Ravnoor Dhaliwal beat Greenwood’s Julianne Ashby 6-2, 6-3, and South’s No. 3 Joanna Zhang topped Madison Sherrod 6-0, 6-3. South Warren’s Payton Lemily and Paisley Harris downed the Lady Gators’ Laura Parkerson and Madison Law 6-1, 6-0 at No. 1 doubles. Greenwood’s No. 2 doubles team of Allie Byrd and Meredy Law beat South’s Lela Owsley and Abigail Joiner 6-4, 6-0. In the boys’ region final, the Gators’ Shepard Kurtz topped South’s Sawyer Durrett 6-1, 6-0, and Greenwood’s Sawyer Kurtz downed Wyatt Joiner 6-1, 6-1. The Gators’ No. 1 doubles duo of Ethan Propp and Barrett Zies beat South’s Hudson Daniels and Jakob Allen 6-0, 6-0 as Greenwood took the team competition 3-1. South’s lone win came at No. 1 singles, where Haris Shahbaz topped Greenwood’s Tyler Sherrod 6-1, 6-0.

Ovo NE SME da se nađe u mašini za veš: Uništava garderobu u sekundi, a svi shvate kad bude kasno
content: Pranje veša deluje kao potpuno rutinska stvar, ali upravo sitni detalji često naprave najveći problem. Dovoljno je da jedan komad odeće sa čičak trakom završi u bubnju zajedno sa osetljivim materijalima i šteta može biti trajna. Mnogi tek nakon pranja primete izvučene niti, uništenu čipku ili oštećene džempere, a glavni krivac često bude upravo čičak. Zašto čičak može da napravi haos u mašini Čičak trake se nalaze na raznim komadima garderobe i kućnog tekstila – od dečje odeće i sportske opreme do jastučnica, navlaka i jakni. Problem nastaje jer se njegova gruba površina tokom okretanja u mašini lako zakači za druge tkanine. Posebno su ugroženi: vuneni komadi pletenina i končane tkanine lan čipka najlon i tanke providne tkanine Kada se materijal zakači za čičak, mogu da se izvuku niti i trajno oštete vlakna, čak i posle samo jednog pranja. Greška koju mnogi prave sa peškirima Još jedan čest problem nastaje kada se odeća sa čičak trakama pere zajedno sa peškirima ili ćebadima. Tokom pranja, čičak skuplja sitna vlakna i dlačice koje se oslobađaju iz tkanine. Vremenom se kukice zapune i traka više ne može dobro da prijanja. Zato mnogi primete da čičak „više ne drži“ kao ranije. Od potpunog HAOSA do savršenog reda: 3 trika uz koje će vaš orman "prodisati" već danas! Foto: Shutterstock/Andrey_Popov Kako pravilno prati odeću sa čičkom Da biste izbegli oštećenje garderobe i produžili trajanje čičak trake, važno je da pre pranja uradite nekoliko jednostavnih stvari. Zatvorite čičak pre ubacivanja u mašinu Otvoren čičak je najveći problem. Pre pranja ga uvek pričvrstite kako ne bi hvatao druge komade odeće tokom okretanja bubnja. Sortirajte veš po materijalu Čak i kada je zatvoren, najbolje je da odeću sa čičkom ne perete sa veoma osetljivim tkaninama. Odvojite: vunu i pleteninu donji veš i čipku tanke lagane materijale Obratite pažnju na etiketu Temperatura vode i program pranja mogu značajno uticati i na materijal i na samu traku. Zato je najbolje pratiti preporuke proizvođača sa etikete. Ni soda ni sirće: Dodajte samo jednu kašiku ovog praha - veš će biti beo kao prvog dana Kako očistiti čičak kada oslabi Ako primetite da se traka više ne lepi dobro, problem je često u nakupljenim vlaknima između kukica. Najjednostavnije rešenje je tvrđa četkica za zube. Njome pažljivo pređite preko čička iz više pravaca kako biste izvukli dlačice i ostatke tkanine. Nakon...

Tinubu Condemns Reported Killing of Abducted Teacher in Oyo
content: .Describes act as barbaric, assures of timely rescue of kidnapped victims .Says security operatives led by the IGP working round the clock to apprehend the bandits and their collaborators .Reiterates call on N’Assembly to expedite action on the enactment of law creating state police Deji Elumoye in Abuja President Bola Tinubu has condemned as barbaric the reported killing of one of the abducted teachers from the Esiele community in Oyo State, while the rescue operation is underway. Bandits had last Friday invaded the Esiele community in Oriire Local Government Area of Oyo State and abducted staff, students, and pupils of Community Grammar School, Baptist Nursery and Primary School and L.A. Primary School. According to a statement issued on Monday by presidential spokesperson, Bayo Onanuga, security operatives are working around the clock to rescue the victims and apprehend the bandits and their collaborators within the community. Tinubu sympathised with Governor Seyi Makinde, the government, and the people of Oyo State for the unfortunate incident and assured them that the federal government will collaborate with the state government to rescue the victims. “I am saddened by the reported killing of one of the teachers kidnapped by the gunmen who invaded the community. I sympathise with Governor Seyi Makinde and commend the steps he has taken on the matter. I sympathise with the families of the kidnapped victims. “The Federal Government is working with the Oyo State government to rescue all the victims. I commend the Inspector-General of Police and the Commissioners of Police in Oyo and Kwara States for their quick intervention and the deployment of a tactical and the Intelligence Response Team (IRT) team to rescue the victims. “The IGP, following my instructions, is personally leading the tech-driven operation. We expect a breakthrough soon. The bandits and all their local collaborators will be fished out and made to face the full wrath of the law. “Cases of kidnapping further make imperative the establishment of state police to man some of our underserved areas. The National Assembly should accelerate the enactment of the law creating state police”, the President said.

title: Cate Blanchett To Star in Selena Gomez’s X-Rated Movie
content: (Photo Credit: Focus Features) Cate Blanchett has joined Selena Gomez in an upcoming X-rated movie. The yet untitled film is being helmed by The Brutalist director Brady Corbet . Cate Blanchett to team up with Selena Gomez and Michael Fassbender Cate Blanchett has joined the cast of an untitled X-rated movie by Brady Corbet . The film also features Michael Fassbender in a key role, but all details regarding the characters are still under wraps, reports Variety . Rumors have suggested that the project might be called The Origin of the World, but nothing is official at the moment. The untitled X-rated movie is said to have its plot span over 150 years, from the 19th century to the present day. However, the story will mostly focus on the 1970s. Last year in November, Corbet confirmed that the film will explore “Northern California’s economy” in some way. Moreover, it will be shot “entirely” on 70mm. (Photo Credit: Pathé Distribution) The director also refuted several speculations about his upcoming movie. “All I can say about the new film is that there’s been a lot of misinformation. It’s true that the film is an X-rated movie, and it’s true that it takes place mostly in the 1970s, but the film spans from the 19th century into the present day — it’s just predominantly focused on the ’70s. The film is really, really genre-defying,” he said. “But it was reported that the movie has something to do with The Texas Chain Saw Massacre, which is not true at all. That is just inaccurate.” Speaking about the cast, Cate Blanchett was recently seen in 2025’s comedy-drama Father Mother Sister Brother. She also starred in last year’s Black Bag movie. As for Gomez, she was seen in 2024’s Emilia Pérez. She has also starred in Hulu’s Only Murders in the Building since 2021. Corbet’s X-rated movie is yet to receive an official release date window. The post Cate Blanchett To Star in Selena Gomez’s X-Rated Movie appeared first on ComingSoon.net - Movie Trailers, TV & Streaming News, and More .

RELATIONSHIP TIPS: మీది ప్రేమేనా లేక మిమ్మల్ని వాడుకుంటున్నారా? ఈ 5 సంకేతాలతో ఇట్టే కనిపెట్టేయండి!
content: ప్రేమ అనేది రెండు మనసుల మధ్య సమానంగా పంచుకోవాల్సిన ఒక అద్భుతమైన భావన. కానీ చాలాసార్లు మనం నిజమైన ప్రేమ అని భ్రమపడి, అవతలి వ్యక్తికి మన సమయాన్ని, భావాలను, శ్రద్ధను ఏకపక్షంగా ధారపోస్తుంటాం. దానికి బదులుగా మనకు ఏమాత్రం ప్రాముఖ్యత తిరిగి లభించదు. సరిగ్గా అక్కడే ప్రేమ ముసుగులో ‘వాడుకోవడం’ అనే ప్రమాదకరమైన కోణం దాగి ఉంటుంది. మీ సంబంధం నిజమైనదా లేక కేవలం ఏకపక్షమైనదా అని తెలుసుకోవడానికి ఈ కింది సంకేతాలు స్పష్టమైన ఆధారాలు. అవసరం ఉన్నప్పుడే పలకరించే తీరు ఒక సంబంధంలో మీరు పదేపదే మెసేజ్ చేస్తూ అవతలి వ్యక్తి స్పందన కోసం ఫోన్ వైపు ఎదురుచూస్తుంటే, అక్కడ సంబంధం ఏకపక్షంగా మారిందని అర్థం. మీరు మెసేజ్ చేసినప్పుడు కనీసం స్పందించని వారు, వారికి ఏదైనా అవసరం వచ్చినప్పుడు మాత్రం అకస్మాత్తుగా తిరిగి వస్తారు. మీతో తీయగా మాట్లాడతారు, మీ సమయం కావాలని అడుగుతారు. వారి అవసరం లేదా పని పూర్తయిన వెంటనే మళ్ళీ మీ మధ్య తెలియని దూరం ఏర్పడుతుంది. ఇలాంటి తీరు మిమ్మల్ని మీరు కోల్పోయేలా చేస్తుంది. ఇది ప్రేమ కాదు, కేవలం తమ స్వార్థం కోసం మిమ్మల్ని వాడుకోవడమే అని గ్రహించాలి. నలుగురిలో మీ బంధాన్ని దాచడం మీరు ఇద్దరూ కలిసి ఏకాంతంగా సమయం గడుపుతారు, ఒకరి జీవితాల గురించి మరొకరు ఎన్నో విషయాలు పంచుకుంటారు. కానీ బయటకు వెళ్ళినప్పుడు లేదా ఇతర స్నేహితులను కలిసినప్పుడు మాత్రం మిమ్మల్ని కేవలం ఒక “స్నేహితుడు” లేదా “స్నేహితురాలు” అని మాత్రమే పరిచయం చేస్తారు. ఆ ఒక్క పదం మీ భావాలన్నింటినీ తక్కువ చేసి చూపిస్తుంది. అలాగే సోషల్ మీడియాలో కూడా ఈ దాపరికాలు స్పష్టంగా కనిపిస్తాయి. వారి వాట్సాప్ స్టేటస్ లో స్నేహితులతో ఉన్న ఫోటోలు, పార్టీల క్షణాలు పంచుకుంటారు కానీ, మీతో ఉన్న ఒక్క ఫోటో కూడా బయటపెట్టరు. ఒక వ్యక్తి మిమ్మల్ని నిజంగా తమ సొంత వ్యక్తిగా భావిస్తే బహిరంగంగా అంగీకరించడానికి ఎప్పుడూ వెనుకాడరు. కష్టకాలంలో భావోద్వేగ మద్దతు కరవవ్వడం నిజమైన ప్రేమ అంటే కేవలం సంతోషంగా ఉన్నప్పుడు మాత్రమే కాదు, బాధలో ఉన్నప్పుడు కూడా తోడుగా నిలబడటం. ఒక చెడ్డ రోజు, అణచిపెట్టుకున్న విచారంతో లేదా భయంతో మీరు వారి వద్దకు వెళ్ళినప్పుడు, వారు మీ పక్కన నిలబడకుండా ఏదో ఒక సాకు చెప్పి దూరంగా వెళ్ళిపోతారు. కానీ వారి సంతోష సమయాల్లో మాత్రం పూర్తిగా వేరే వ్యక్తిగా మారిపోయి మీతో ఎంజాయ్ చేస్తుంటారు. అంటే వారు కేవలం మంచి సమయాల్లో మాత్రమే మీ తోడు కోరుకుంటున్నారు. మీ భావోద్వేగాలకు, కన్నీళ్లకు అక్కడ ఎలాంటి విలువ లేదని దీని అర్థం. ఏకపక్ష ప్రయత్నం, కృతజ్ఞత లేకపోవడం ఒక సంబంధంలో సమతుల్యత ఉండటం చాలా ముఖ్యం. ప్రేమ అంటే కేవలం శారీరక సాన్నిహిత్యం మాత్రమే కాదు. సంబంధాన్ని నిలబెట్టుకోవడానికి ఎప్పుడూ మీరే ప్రయత్నించడం, మీరే ముందుగా మాట్లాడటం లాంటివి చేస్తుంటే ఆ ఏకపక్ష బంధం మిమ్మల్ని మానసికంగా అలసిపోయేలా చేస్తుంది. మీ త్యాగాలకు వారు కనీస కృతజ్ఞత కూడా చూపించరు. మీ ఉనికిని చాలా తేలికగా (Take for granted) తీసుకుంటారు. ప్రేమ ఎవరినీ కించపరచదు, ఒంటరిగా వదిలిపెట్టదు. కాబట్టి...

ದಂಗಲ್, ಸುಲ್ತಾನ್ ರೀತಿ ಇದೆಯಾ ‘ಪೆದ್ದಿ’ ಕಥೆ? ಆಮಿರ್, ಸಲ್ಲುಗೆ ರಾಮ್ ಚರಣ್ ಧನ್ಯವಾದ
content: ಟಾಲಿವುಡ್ ನಟ ರಾಮ್ ಚರಣ್ ಅಭಿನಯದ, ಬಹುನಿರೀಕ್ಷಿತ ‘ಪೆದ್ದಿ’ ( Peddi ) ಚಿತ್ರದ ಟ್ರೇಲರ್ ಲಾಂಚ್ ಕಾರ್ಯಕ್ರಮ ಮುಂಬೈನಲ್ಲಿ ಅದ್ದೂರಿಯಾಗಿ ನೆರವೇರಿದೆ. ಈ ಕ್ರೀಡಾ ಆಧಾರಿತ ಸಾಹಸ ಪ್ರಧಾನ ಚಿತ್ರಕ್ಕಾಗಿ ರಾಮ್ ಚರಣ್ (Ram Charan) ಭಾರಿ ದೈಹಿಕ ಬದಲಾವಣೆ ಮಾಡಿಕೊಂಡಿದ್ದಾರೆ. ಕಾರ್ಯಕ್ರಮದಲ್ಲಿ ಮಾತನಾಡಿದ ಅವರು, ಚಿತ್ರದ ಕಥೆಯ ಬಗ್ಗೆ ಮಾಹಿತಿ ಹಂಚಿಕೊಂಡಿದ್ದಲ್ಲದೆ, ಬಾಲಿವುಡ್ ಸೂಪರ್ ಸ್ಟಾರ್‌ ನಟರಾದ ಸಲ್ಮಾನ್ ಖಾನ್ ಮತ್ತು ಆಮಿರ್ ಖಾನ್ ಅವರಿಗೆ ವಿಶೇಷವಾಗಿ ಧನ್ಯವಾದಗಳನ್ನು ಅರ್ಪಿಸಿದ್ದಾರೆ. ಕಾರ್ಯಕ್ರಮದಲ್ಲಿ ರಾಮ್ ಚರಣ್ ಅವರಿಗೆ ಚಿತ್ರಕ್ಕಾಗಿ ಮಾಡಿಕೊಂಡ ಟ್ರಾನ್ಸ್​ಫಾರ್ಮೇಷನ್ ಕುರಿತು ಪ್ರಶ್ನೆ ಕೇಳಲಾಯಿತು. ಇದಕ್ಕೆ ಉತ್ತರಿಸುವ ಮುನ್ನ ಬಾಲಿವುಡ್ ಸ್ಟಾರ್ ನಟರನ್ನು ಸ್ಮರಿಸಿದ ಚರಣ್, ‘ಮೊದಲನೆಯದಾಗಿ ಸಲ್ಮಾನ್ ಸರ್ ಮತ್ತು ಆಮಿರ್ ಸರ್ ಅವರಿಗೆ ಧನ್ಯವಾದಗಳು. ಅವರು ‘ಸುಲ್ತಾನ್’ ಮತ್ತು ‘ದಂಗಲ್’ ಸಿನಿಮಾಗಳ ಮೂಲಕ ಇಂತಹ ಕ್ರೀಡಾ ಆಧಾರಿತ ಚಿತ್ರಗಳಿಗೆ ದೊಡ್ಡ ಹಾದಿ ಮಾಡಿಕೊಟ್ಟಿದ್ದಾರೆ. ಆ ಸಿನಿಮಾಗಳು ನಮಗೆ ಭಾರಿ ಆತ್ಮವಿಶ್ವಾಸವನ್ನು ತುಂಬಿದವು’ ಎಂದಿದ್ದಾರೆ. ‘ಈ ರೀತಿಯ ವಿಭಿನ್ನ ಪ್ರಯೋಗದ ಸಿನಿಮಾಗಳನ್ನು ಆರಂಭಿಸಿದ್ದಕ್ಕಾಗಿ ಅವರಿಬ್ಬರಿಗೂ ಧನ್ಯವಾದಗಳು. ಅಂತಹ ಚಿತ್ರಗಳು ಹಿಂದೆ ಯಶಸ್ವಿಯಾಗಿವೆ. ಹಾಗಾಗಿ ನಾವೂ ಕೂಡ ಅದೇ ಹಾದಿಯನ್ನು ಅನುಸರಿಸಿದ್ದೇವೆ’ ಎಂದು ರಾಮ್ ಚರಣ್ ಮುಕ್ತವಾಗಿ ಹೇಳಿಕೊಂಡಿದ್ದಾರೆ. ಹಾಗಾಗಿ ‘ಪೆದ್ದಿ’ ಕೂಡ ‘ದಂಗಲ್’ ಮತ್ತು ‘ಸುಲ್ತಾನ್’ ರೀತಿಯ ಕಥೆಯನ್ನು ಹೊಂದಿದೆ ಎಂಬುದು ಗೊತ್ತಾಗಿದೆ. ‘ಪೆದ್ದಿ’ ಚಿತ್ರದ ಟ್ರೇಲರ್: ‘ಪೆದ್ದಿ’ ಚಿತ್ರದಲ್ಲಿ ರಾಮ್ ಚರಣ್ ಕೇವಲ ಒಂದೇ ಕ್ರೀಡೆಗೆ ಸೀಮಿತವಾಗಿಲ್ಲ. ಬದಲಿಗೆ ಅವರು ಕ್ರಿಕೆಟ್, ಕುಸ್ತಿ, ಮತ್ತು ಓಟ ಸೇರಿದಂತೆ ಮೂರು ವಿಭಿನ್ನ ಕ್ರೀಡೆಗಳ ಅಖಾಡಕ್ಕಿಳಿದಿದ್ದಾರೆ. ಪ್ರತಿಯೊಂದು ಕ್ರೀಡೆಗೂ ತಕ್ಕಂತೆ ಅವರು ತಮ್ಮ ದೇಹದ ತೂಕ ಮತ್ತು ಲುಕ್ ಬದಲಾಯಿಸಿಕೊಂಡಿದ್ದಾರೆ. ಈ ಬಗ್ಗೆ ಕೂಡ ಅವರು ಸುದ್ದಿಗೋಷ್ಠಿಯಲ್ಲಿ ಮಾತನಾಡಿದರು. ಇದನ್ನೂ ಓದಿ: ‘ಪೆದ್ದಿ’ ಚಿತ್ರದಲ್ಲಿ ಶಿವರಾಜ್​ಕುಮಾರ್ ಗತ್ತು ನೋಡಿ; ಇಲ್ಲಿದೆ ಮೇಕಿಂಗ್ ವಿಡಿಯೋ ‘ಚಿತ್ರಕ್ಕಾಗಿ ದೈಹಿಕ ಬದಲಾವಣೆ ಮಾಡಿಕೊಳ್ಳುವುದು ಕಥೆಯದೇ ಒಂದು ಭಾಗವಾಗಿತ್ತು. ನಿರ್ದೇಶಕ ಬುಚ್ಚಿ ಬಾಬು ಸನಾ ನನ್ನ ಮನೆಗೆ ಬಂದು ನೆಲದ ಮೇಲೆ ಕುಳಿತು 2 ಗಂಟೆ 40 ನಿಮಿಷಗಳ ಕಾಲ ಕಥೆ ಓದಿದಾಗ ನನಗೆ ಮರುಮಾತೇ ಇರಲಿಲ್ಲ. ಈ ಸಿನಿಮಾ ಶೂಟಿಂಗ್ ದೈಹಿಕವಾಗಿ ತುಂಬಾ ದಣಿವಿನಿಂದ ಕೂಡಿರಲಿದೆ ಎಂಬುದು ನನಗೆ ಗೊತ್ತಿತ್ತು’ ಎಂದು ಶೂಟಿಂಗ್ ದಿನಗಳನ್ನು ನೆನಪಿಸಿಕೊಂಡಿದ್ದಾರೆ. ‘ಒಬ್ಬ ವ್ಯಕ್ತಿ ಕ್ರೀಡೆಯ ಮೂಲಕ ತನ್ನ ಅಸ್ತಿತ್ವವನ್ನು ಹುಡುಕಿಕೊಳ್ಳುವ ಕಥೆ ಇದು. ನಾವೆಲ್ಲರೂ ಬದುಕಲು ಒಂದಲ್ಲ ಒಂದು ಗುರುತನ್ನು ಬಯಸುತ್ತೇವೆ. ಇಲ್ಲಿ ಪೆದ್ದಿ ಕೂಡ ತನ್ನದೇ ಆದ ಅಸ್ತಿತ್ವಕ್ಕಾಗಿ ಹೋರಾಡುತ್ತಾನೆ. ಒಂದು ದೊಡ್ಡ ಕಾರಣಕ್ಕಾಗಿ ಆತ ಹೇಗೆ ಕ್ರಾಸ್ ಓವರ್ ಅಥ್ಲೀಟ್ ಆಗಿ ಬದಲಾಗುತ್ತಾನೆ ಎಂಬುದನ್ನು ನಿರ್ದೇಶಕರು ತುಂಬಾ ಸಹಜವಾಗಿ ಹಾಗೂ ಅಷ್ಟೇ ಕಮರ್ಷಿಯಲ್ ಆಗಿ ತೆರೆಮೇಲೆ ತಂದಿದ್ದಾರೆ’ ಎಂದು ರಾಮ್ ಚರಣ್ ವಿವರಿಸಿದ್ದಾರೆ. ಇನ್ನಷ್ಟು ಸಿನಿಮಾ ಸುದ್ದಿಗಳಿಗಾಗಿ ಇಲ್ಲಿ ಕ್ಲಿಕ್​ ಮಾಡಿ.

Profeco revela que Telcel aplicó cobro erróneo de IA a 135 mil personas
content: Profeco revela que Telcel aplicó cobro erróneo de IA. Cortesía: Gobierno de México La Procuraduría Federal del Consumidor (Profeco) reveló que Telcel aplicó de manera errónea un cobro relacionado con un servicio de inteligencia artificial a 135 mil 602 personas, situación por la que ya se realizan devoluciones y se analiza una posible sanción contra la empresa. Dicha información fue dada a conocer por Iván Escalante durante la Mañanera del Pueblo que encabeza la presidenta de México, Claudia Sheinbaum Pardo , donde explicó que el cargo de 395 pesos no fue informado correctamente a los usuarios. El titular de Profeco señaló que las devoluciones comenzaron desde abril y se han realizado incluso sin necesidad de que los consumidores presenten una queja formal. Profeco también revisó depósitos en garantía Durante su participación, Iván Escalante explicó que uno de los temas revisados con Telcel fue el relacionado con los depósitos en garantía incluidos en algunos planes telefónicos. Detalló que el contrato de adhesión ya fue modificado desde el 3 de junio de 2025 y que la dependencia recibió 104 quejas relacionadas con este tema. Según explicó, hasta el momento se ha conciliado el 95% de esos casos. El funcionario aseguró que Profeco mantiene vigilancia sobre las prácticas comerciales de la empresa para evitar afectaciones a los consumidores. Además, señaló que las revisiones continúan para verificar que este tipo de cargos no vuelvan a aplicarse de manera incorrecta a otros usuarios. 👉 Síguenos en Google Analizan posibles sanciones contra Telcel Sobre el cobro po r inteligencia artificial , Profeco indicó que el procedimiento todavía sigue en curso, por lo que será hasta el cierre total de las conciliaciones cuando se determine si Telcel puede recibir algún tipo de sanción. Iván Escalante recordó que la ley contempla retribuciones de hasta el 20% para las personas consumidoras en ciertos casos, por lo que la autoridad revisará el comportamiento completo del proveedor antes de emitir una resolución final. También explicó que las devoluciones del cobro fueron realizadas el 1 y 10 de abril, así como el 4 de mayo. Hasta ahora, Profeco únicamente ha recibido 22 quejas formales relacionadas con el servicio de inteligencia artificial. El caso ha generado conversación entre usuarios de telefonía móvil debido al crecimiento de servicios ligados a inteligencia artificial dentro de los planes comerciales de las...

title: Galaxy S26 Ultra Nightography explained: What’s improved this year
content: Low-light photography is one of the areas where smartphones have made the most progress in recent years, and it is also where the differences between phones show up most clearly. The Galaxy S26 Ultra brings some of the most meaningful Nightography [1] upgrades since Samsung introduced the feature, with the headline improvements coming from brighter lenses on both the main camera and the 50MP telephoto — capturing 47% and 37% more light respectively compared to the Galaxy S25 Ultra. Here is a look at what has changed and why it matters in practice. What is Nightography on the Galaxy S26 Ultra? Nightography is Samsung’s name for the set of camera features designed to help the Galaxy S26 Ultra take better photos and videos in dim conditions. It covers the full camera system — the main camera, the telephoto lenses, video recording, and selfies. The improvements this year are primarily hardware-driven. Samsung has fitted brighter lenses on both the main camera and the 50MP telephoto lens, which means the sensor captures more detail before any processing takes place. Cleaner results come from the hardware itself, rather than from software trying to recover what was never captured in the first place. How do the cameras compare to the Galaxy S25 Ultra? Here is a quick look at the key differences: What does the brighter main lens mean in practice? The f/1.4 aperture on the main camera produces two practical benefits. First, it allows the camera to use faster shutter speeds in the same conditions, which means less blur when photographing people, pets, or anything that moves — a common problem in low light. Second, it reduces the graininess that appears when a camera has to push its sensitivity too high. The result is cleaner, more natural-looking photos with better shadow detail and more accurate colours in the dark. What about zoom shots at night? Zoom shots in dim conditions have traditionally been one of the harder things for smartphone cameras to do well. The upgraded f/2.9 aperture on the Galaxy S26 Ultra’s 50MP telephoto lens is a meaningful step forward here, bringing in up to 37% more light than the Galaxy S25 Ultra’s equivalent. Whether you are shooting from the back of a concert crowd, capturing a performer on stage, or photographing something across a dark street, the 50MP telephoto lens maintains sharpness and detail where the Galaxy S25 Ultra would have struggled more. Zoom shots at night are simply more reliable with the Galaxy S26 Ultra. What is the...

Посол США обвинил Евросоюз в затягивании выполнения торговой сделки
content: Посол США при Евросоюзе Эндрю Паздер призвал Брюссель незамедлительно выполнить условия торговой сделки с администрацией Дональда Трампа. Как сообщило информационное издание "Politico", американский дипломат обвинил ЕС в намеренном затягивании реализации достигнутых договоренностей. Согласно подписанному соглашению, Евросоюз должен был отменить пошлины на американские промышленные товары и снизить существующие торговые барьеры. Однако, по словам Паздера, за последние девять месяцев Брюссель не сделал ни одного послабления для американской стороны. При этом Вашингтон уже выполнил свою часть обязательств, снизив тарифы на широкий список европейской продукции, включая автомобили и автозапчасти, до 15%. Американский представитель также подверг критике попытки Европарламента добавить в уже подписанное соглашение новые дополнительные условия. Паздер пояснил, что недавнее решение Дональда Трампа вернуть 25%-ные пошлины на импорт легковых автомобилей и легких грузовиков стало прямым ответом на невыполнение договоренностей со стороны ЕС. Он подчеркнул, что данные ограничения касаются исключительно готовых автомобилей, но не распространяются на автозапчасти и на машины европейских брендов, которые собираются на заводах внутри США. Как сообщило информационное агентство, после недавнего телефонного разговора Дональда Трампа с главой Еврокомиссии Урсулой фон дер Ляйен, в ходе которого также обсуждались вопросы ядерного оружия Ирана, введение повышенных пошлин было отложено до 4 июля 2026 года. Белый дом ожидает, что до этого момента ЕС перейдет от затягивания процесса к реальному выполнению сделки.

Izgleda da se Mourinho zaista vraća na klupu Real Madrida
content: – Karizmatični portugalski nogometni trener, 63-godišnji Jose Mourinho dogovorio je dvogodišnju suradnju s madridskim Realom te bi se trebao vratiti na klupu “kraljevskog” kluba nakon 13 godina, objavio je ESPN. Mourinho je vodio Real od 2011. do 2013. godine te je tijekom tog razdoblja osvojio po jedno španjolsko prvenstvo, jedan Kup kralja i jedan španjolski Superkup. Ove sezone Mourinho je vodio portugalskog velikana Benficu s kojom je zauzeo treće mjesto u prvenstvu, što znači kako sastav s Luza sljedeće sezone neće igrati u Ligi prvaka. Iako ga ugovor s Benficom veže do sljedećeg ljeta, Mourinho odlazi s klupe uz odštetu od osam milijuna eura. Madridski Real posljednje dvije sezone nije osvojio niti jedan trofej, lošiji rezultati posla su još u siječnju stajali trenera Xabija Alonsa, a momčad je s ništa boljim učinkom do kraja sezone vodio Alvaro Arbeloa. Mourinho je trenersko ime izgradio kao trener Porta s kojim je osvojio Ligu prvaka 2004. godine, uslijedile su uspješne epizode u Chelseaju i milanskom Interu s kojim je osvojio Ligu prvaka 2010., ali u zadnjih 15 godina niže uglavnom neuspjehe. Nakon Reala vodio je opet Chelsea, pa Manchester United, Tottenham Hotspur, Romu, Fenerbahce i Benficu, a tijekom svih tih poslova osvojio je Liga kup, Commonity Shiled i Europsku ligu s Unitedom te Konferencijsku ligu s Romom. Objava Izgleda da se Mourinho zaista vraća na klupu Real Madrida pojavila se prvi puta na Novi list .

റഹീം നാട്ടിലെത്തുന്നത് കാത്ത് കേരളം; ശിക്ഷാ കാലാവധി 20ന് പൂർത്തിയാവും, പെരുന്നാളവധിക്ക് മുമ്പ് നടപടികൾ
content:
റിയാദ്: സൗദി ജയിലിൽ നിന്ന് റഹീമിൻ്റെ മോചനം കാത്ത് കേരളം. ശിക്ഷാ കാലാവധി പൂർത്തിയായാലുടൻ നാട്ടിലേക്ക് കയറ്റി അയക്കുമെന്നാണ് പ്രതീക്ഷിക്കുന്നത്. പെരുന്നാളവധിക്ക് മുമ്പ് നടപടികൾ പൂർത്തിയാകുമെന്ന പ്രതീക്ഷയിലാണ് ബന്ധപ്പെട്ടവർ. റഹീമിൻ്റെ മോചനത്തിനായി പണം കണ്ടെത്താൻ നടന്നത് സമാനതകളില്ലാത്ത പ്രവർത്തനമാണ്. പക്ഷേ പിന്നെയും നിയമനടപടിക്രമങ്ങൾ നീളുകയായിരുന്നു.

അതിനിടെ, ശിക്ഷാ കാലയളവ് ലഘൂകരിക്കാൻ വേണ്ടി ശ്രമങ്ങൾ നടന്നു. ഒടുവിൽ ഇരുപതാം തിയതിയോടെ ശിക്ഷാ കാലാവധി പൂർത്തിയാവുകയാണ്. പുറത്തിറങ്ങിയാലുടൻ പ്രത്യേക ചാനലിലൂടെ ഡീപോർട്ട് ചെയ്യുകയാണ് ചെയ്യുക. ഇതിനുള്ള നടപടികൾ പൂർത്തിയാവണം. വൈകലുണ്ടാകാതിരിക്കാൻ യാത്ര ചെയ്യാനുള്ള ഔട്ട്പാസ് ഉൾപ്പടെ രേഖകൾ ഇതിനോടകം തയാറാക്കിയിട്ടുണ്ട്. അതേസമയം, പുറത്തിറങ്ങുന്നത് വൈകാതിരിക്കാൻ അനുകൂലമായ സമീപനം അധികൃതരിൽ നിന്ന് ഉണ്ടാകുമെന്ന് പ്രതീക്ഷിക്കുന്നുണ്ട്. അതിനായി അഭ്യർത്ഥിക്കുകയും ചെയ്തിട്ടുണ്ട്. എംബസിയും നടപടിക്രമങ്ങൾ പൂർത്തിയാക്കിയിട്ടുണ്ട്.

അതേസമയം, ഇനിയുള്ള രണ്ട് ദിവസത്തിനകം നടപടികൾ പൂർത്തിയായില്ലെങ്കിലാണ് പ്രതിസന്ധിയുണ്ടാവുക. വ്യാഴാഴ്ച്ചയോടെ പെരുന്നാളിന്റെ നീണ്ട അവധിയിലേക്ക് സൗദി കടക്കും. അതിന് ശേഷമേ പിന്നീട് പൂർത്തിയാക്കാനാകൂ.

West Bengal Government: এবার সরকারি দফতরগুলিতে ব্যয় কমাতে একগুচ্ছ নির্দেশিকা, কী কী বলা হল?
content: কলকাতা: কয়েকদিন আগেই সরকারি দফতরগুলিতে কর্মীদের কাজের সময়সীমা নিয়ে কড়া নির্দেশিকা জারি করেছিল সরকার। এবার মুখ্যমন্ত্রী শুভেন্দু অধিকারীর নির্দেশে সরকারি দফতরগুলিকে ব্যয় কমানো ও কাজের দক্ষতা বাড়ানোর নির্দেশ দেওয়া হল। সব দফতরের প্রধান এবং জেলাশাসকদের এই নির্দেশ দেওয়া হল সোমবার। ব্যয় কমাতে ভিডিয়ো কনফারেন্স, ভার্চুয়াল মিটিং ও ডিজিটাল প্ল্যাটফর্মের সর্বাধিক ব্যবহারে জোর দিতে বলা হয়েছে। প্রয়োজনে কাজের দক্ষতা বজায় রেখে ‘ওয়ার্ক ফ্রম হোম’ চালুর সম্ভাবনা খতিয়ে দেখার নির্দেশও দেওয়া হয়েছে। ১৫ বছর পর রাজ্যে সরকার পরিবর্তন হয়েছে। মুখ্যমন্ত্রী পদে শপথ নিয়েই শুভেন্দু অধিকারী স্পষ্ট করে দেন, কর্মসংস্থান ফিরিয়ে আনতে হবে। আবার রাজ্যের মাথায় বিপুল ঋণের বোঝা থাকলেও মুখ্য়মন্ত্রী জানিয়ে দেন, বিগত সরকারগুলির চালু থাকা কোনও সামাজিক প্রকল্পই বন্ধ করা হবে না। এই পরিস্থিতিতে অর্থের জোগান নিয়ে প্রশ্ন উঠে। কয়েকদিন আগে নতুন মুখ্যসচিব মনোজ আগরওয়াল জানিয়েছিলেন, তাঁরা ঠিক পথ বের করবেন। ব্যয় কমানোর কথাও বলেছিলেন। এবার সরকারি দফতরগুলিতে ব্যয় কমানো নিয়ে নির্দেশ দেওয়া হল। ব্যয় কমাতে কী কী নির্দেশ দেওয়া হল? সরকারি দফতরগুলিতে ব্যয় কমানোর বার্তা দিয়ে বলা হয়েছে, অপ্রয়োজনীয় সরকারি সফর কমানো এবং গণপরিবহণ, কারপুলিং ও ইলেকট্রিক গাড়ির ব্যবহার বাড়ানোর উপর গুরুত্ব দিতে হবে। সরকারি অফিসে বিদ্যুৎ ও শক্তি সাশ্রয়মূলক ব্যবস্থা গ্রহণের নির্দেশ দেওয়া হয়েছে। পেপারলেস অফিস, ই-অফিস চালু এবং অপ্রয়োজনীয় খরচ কমানোর উপর জোর দিতে হবে। দেশীয়ভাবে তৈরি পণ্যের ব্যবহার ও ‘স্বদেশি’ উদ্যোগকে উৎসাহ দেওয়ার নির্দেশ দেওয়া হয়েছে। বর্জ্য হ্রাস, পুনর্ব্যবহার ও প্রাকৃতিক সম্পদের দায়িত্বশীল ব্যবহারের উপর গুরুত্ব দিতে হবে। স্বাস্থ্যকর ও টেকসই জীবনযাত্রা সম্পর্কে সচেতনতা বাড়ানোর নির্দেশ দেওয়া হয়েছে। প্রতিটি দফতর ও জেলা প্রশাসনকে ২০২৬-২৭ সালের জন্য অ্যাকশন প্ল্যান তৈরি করে ২২ মে’র মধ্যে মুখ্যসচিবের দফতরে জমা দিতে হবে। আগামী ১ জুলাই থেকে প্রতি মাসে অগ্রগতি রিপোর্ট জমা দেওয়ার নির্দেশ দেওয়া হয়েছে। সমস্ত সচিব ও জেলাশাসকদের বিষয়টিকে ‘অত্যন্ত জরুরি’ হিসেবে দেখে দ্রুত পদক্ষেপ নেওয়ার নির্দেশ দিল সরকার।

content: Britannian pääministerin paikkaa havitteleva ex-terveysministeri Wes Streeting uskoo maansa tulevaisuuden olevan Euroopan unionissa. Britannian seuraavaksi pääministeriksi voi hyvin suurella todennäköisyydellä nousta henkilö, joka kannattaa vakaasti maan jälleenliittymistä Euroopan unioniin. Britannian pääministerin paikkaa havittelevat tällä hetkellä toden teolla virastaan eronnut terveysministeri Wes Streeting sekä Suur-Manchesterin pormestari Andy Burnham.

Paddy Procurement Crosses 40 LMT
content: Hyderabad: Paddy procurement for Rabi 2025‐26 has crossed 40 lakh metric tonnes (LMT) in Telangana, benefitting over 5.5 lakh farmers through direct payments of ₹6,566 crore into their bank accounts. Five districts — Nizamabad (6.20 LMT), Nalgonda (5.51 LMT), Kamareddy (3.03 LMT), Suryapet (2.70 LMT) and Peddapalli (2.20 LMT) — recorded the highest volumes, together accounting for 40.3 LMT against the state’s target of 90 LMT. To prevent storage bottlenecks and keep procurement centres ready for daily arrivals, the civil supplies department has deployed 12,000 transport vehicles, including lorries, tractors and DCMs, to move grain swiftly from centres to mills. Officials said farmers are bringing in both fine and coarse varieties. So far, 11 LMT of fine grain (Sannarakam) has been procured, representing 92 per cent of arrivals, while 29 LMT of coarse grain (Doddurakam) accounts for 81 per cent. A network of 8,575 procurement centres is operating across districts. Of these, 4,455 PACS‐run centres have handled 24 LMT, 3,563 IKP centres 14 LMT, and 557 others 2 LMT. Civil supplies commissioner Stephen Raveendra said 18.6 crore gunny bags and adequate tarpaulins have been positioned to safeguard produce. Farmers can contact the civil supplies department’s toll‐free helpline 1967 for queries or assistance.

Haris ne komunicira sa ćerkom Đinom, a zbog jedne njene odluke Melina nije bila oduševljena: "Nije na mene!"
content: Porodični odnosi u domu Džinovića ponovo su pod lupom javnosti, a u centru pažnje našla se Đina Džinović . Nakon što je prisustvovala svadbi svoje majke Meline i britanskog bogataša, spekulacije o narušenim odnosima sa ocem dodatno su se rasplamsale. Haris Džinović navodno nije blagonaklono reagovao na ćerkin potez, a u svojim poslednjim izjavama jasno je stavio do znanja da ga život bivše supruge više ne zanima i da je to poglavlje za njega završeno. Posebnu pažnju javnosti privuklo je to što je pevač u više navrata govorio o sinu Kanu, ističući da mu je najveća podrška i oslonac, dok Đinu nije pomenuo nijednom rečju. Mnogi su upravo u tome videli potvrdu nagađanja da otac i ćerka trenutno nisu u najboljim odnosima. Ipak, ni odnos Đine i Meline nije oduvek bio idealan. Njih dve su ranije imale nesuglasice, prvenstveno zbog Đininog života na društvenim mrežama i načina na koji se predstavlja javnosti. Melina je svojevremeno otvoreno govorila o tome da ne podržava ćerkino preterano eksponiranje na Instagramu i TikToku, kao ni objavljivanje provokativnih fotografija. - Bila je upozorena, bila je savetovana, zamoljena, ona je odlučila da ona to jako voli, ekstrovertna je na oca. Bivša Harisova supruga tada je istakla i da smatra kako je velika greška što je Đina sebe previše izložila svetu društvenih mreža i komentarima nepoznatih ljudi. Istakla je tad da ne može da shvati ćerkinu potrebu da komunicira sa ljudima koje ne poznaje, ali je i dodala da joj je rekla svoje mišljenje, čak i zamolila da to ne radi, i da "posle toga ne želi više da se petlja". - Čim je pošla putem društvenih mreža, čim voli komunikaciju i da se slika, na mene nije - govorila je Melina svojevremeno. (Telegraf.rs)

title: Confusion as parallel primaries, aspirants’ claims of victory mar APC senatorial election in Edo
content: Parallel elections reportedly marred the conduct of the All Progressives Congress, APC, primary for the Edo South senatorial election. DAILY POST reports that two aspirants, Pastor Osagie Ize-Ihama and Omoregie Ogbeide-Ihama, are laying claim to the candidacy of the party. The primary was reportedly conducted by supporters loyal to Ogbeide-Ihama, who is speculated to be sponsored by Chief Nyesow Wike, the former governor of Rivers State and the incumbent minister of the Federal Capital Territory (FCT), and allegedly backed by Governor Monday Okpebholo of Edo State. Ogbeide-Ihama was declared the highest scorer of the election by Mohammad Ajana, chairman of the primary election committee. Ajana said Ogbeide-Ihama polled a total of 27, 154 votes while his closest rival, Senator Neda Imasuen, scored 13,580 votes, and Ize-Iyamu got 6,785 votes in all the 77 wards across the seven local government areas of the senatorial district. In other results, one Abubakar Muhammad Kabiru, who is the chief returning officer, declared Pastor Osagie Ize-Iyamu the winner. Kabiru said Osagie Ize-Iyamu scored 33,399 votes to emerge the winner, and that Omoregie Ogbeide-Ihama polled 12,560 votes, while Neda Imasuen got 5,107 votes. Speaking shortly after the announcement of the results, the elated Pastor Osagie Ize-Iyamu, while expressing gratitude to his supporters, assured them of better representation after the next round of victory in the general election. He said the victory marks a significant step as he prepares to represent the APC in the senatorial district. It was gathered that officials of the Independent Electoral Commission, INEC, were on the ground to observe the conduct of the primaries held across the seven local government areas that made up the Senatorial District. Confusion as parallel primaries, aspirants’ claims of victory mar APC senatorial election in Edo

Connections Help, Hints & Clues for Today, May 19
content: Photo Credit: Jakub Porzycki | NurPhoto via Getty Images Does the May 19, 2026 (#1073) edition of NYT Connections have you scratching your head? Here are some clues and hints to help you save your streak and solve today’s puzzle, as well as the final answers. Connections by The New York Times is a popular word game created by Wyna Liu that fans can enjoy for free online. This daily puzzle challenges players to sort a given set of 16 words into groups of four. The words may appear random at first glance, but a closer look reveals that they are secretly connected. To solve the puzzle, players must find out what these hidden connections are and select the words that belong in a common group. The game is over once all groups are completed or the player fails to select the correct words in four guesses. Moreover, the game also offers a “one away...” hint whenever a player gets closer to solving a particular group. So, here are the hints and answers for the May 19 Connections puzzle. Connections hints for May 19 Here are some hints for each group: Yellow Group : The words in this group are related to babies. Green Group : This collection features names related to changing something. Blue Group : This set features words associated with a famous author. Purple Group : This group features words that sound similar to different types of fish. What are the Connections answers for today Without further ado, here are the answers for the May 19, 2026, NYT Connections puzzle: Yellow Group: Things Babies Do – BABBLE, CRY, NURSE, and TEETHE. Green Group: Modify Deceptively – ALTER, COOK, DOCTOR, and FUDGE. Blue Group: Judy Blume Books – BLUBBER, DEENIE, FOREVER, and SUPERFUDGE. Purple Group: Fish Minus A Letter – FOUNDER, SALON, SURGEON, and TROT. The New York Times Games collection offers multiple other unique popular puzzles, such as Wordle , Pips, Spelling Bee, Strands, and the NYT Crossword, to name a few. The post Connections Help, Hints & Clues for Today, May 19 appeared first on ComingSoon.net - Movie Trailers, TV & Streaming News, and More .

title: Haryana deploys special teams to curb Yamuna pollution
content: Taking stringent measures to curb pollution in the Yamuna river, the Haryana State Pollution Control Board (HSPCB) has deployed senior nodal officers and constituted special teams to conduct surprise raids in the 10 districts through which the river flows in the state. Notably, the Yamuna flows for around 320 km through Haryana. The river enters Haryana through Yamunanagar with relatively clean water, passes through Karnal, Panipat and Sonepat, and then enters Delhi. It re-enters Haryana through Faridabad and, after flowing through Palwal, enters Uttar Pradesh near Kosi in Mathura. The HSPCB conducted a detailed survey of 11 drains discharging into the Yamuna in the state. These include the Dhanaura drain in Yamunanagar, Drain No. 2 in Panipat, Drain No. 6 in Sonepat, Mungeshpur drain, KCB drain and Drain No. 8 in Bahadurgarh, Leg-1, Leg-2 and Leg-3 drains in Gurugram, Budhiya Nala in Faridabad, and Gaunchi drain in Ballabgarh/Palwal. The pollution board carried out the survey last year and identified points where sewage, solid waste, industrial waste and hazardous waste were allegedly being discharged into these drains without treatment through Sewage Treatment Plants (STPs) and Common Effluent Treatment Plants (CETPs). Based on the survey findings, the board prepared a Yamuna Action Plan (YAP) aimed at making the river pollution-free. Taking the initiative a step further, the HSPCB has now appointed nodal officers, including Chief Environment Engineers (CEEs) and Senior Environment Engineers (SEEs), in the 10 districts through which these drains flow. The board has appointed Bhupender Rinwa, CEE, as nodal officer for Gurugram; Balraj Ahlawat, CEE, for Rohtak and Jhajjar; Satinder Pal, SEE, for Faridabad and Palwal; Jatinder Pal, SEE, for Karnal; Sanjeev Kumar, SEE, for Sonepat; Naveen Gulia, SEE, for Yamunanagar; Nirmal Kumar, SEE, for Panipat; and Kuldeep Singh, SEE, for Nuh district. Yogesh Kumar, Member Secretary of the HSPCB, said all CEEs and SEEs had been appointed as nodal officers for the districts through which the Yamuna flows. “All nodal officers will periodically review the monitoring, implementation and progress of the Yamuna Action Plan in coordination with the concerned regional officers,” he said. Apart from this, the nodal officers will also hold meetings with industrial associations to promote environmental awareness and ensure compliance with pollution control norms. Bivši košarkaš Partizana i Zvezde treću godinu u nizu ostaje u istom klubu, ponovo produžio ugovor
content: Nekadašnji košarkaš Partizana i Zvezdu, Aleksandar Sani Aranitović doneo je odluku da i treću godinu u nizu ostane na istom mestu, pošto je danas objavljeno da je produžio ugovor sa španskim Breoganom. Vest je objavljena i na zvaničnom sajtu ACB lige, pa više nema nikakve dileme oko toga da li će Aranitović ostati u Breoganu. On je nedavno došao u centar pažnje kada je sa istim klubom pobedio Real u Madridu, što je prvi trijumf ovog kluba posle više od dve decenije u španskoj prestonici. Prosečno je ove sezone beležio 7,2 poena po utakmici uz 4,5 skokova i 0,9 asistencija za Breogan. Aleksandar Aranitović je karijeru započeo u Zvezdi, gde je igrao od 2015. do 2017. godine. Potom je prešao u Partizan gde je bio od 2017. do 2019. godine. U međuvremenu je bio na pozajmici u Megi. Zatim je ređao klubove ADA Bloa u Francuskoj, Hiros den Boš u Holandiji, Mladost Zemun u Srbiji, Alitus Džukija u Litvaniji, Cibona u Hrvatskoj, pre nego što je stigao do Breogana. View this post on Instagram A post shared by Liga Endesa (@acbcom) Sa mladom reprezentacijom Srbije ima srebro sa Evropskog prvenstva za igrače do 16 godina u Ukrajini u 2013. godini i bronzu sa Svetskog prvenstva U17 u Ujedinjenim Arapskim Emiratima iz 2014. godine. (Telegraf.rs)

Shakira and Burna Boy release official 2026 FIFA World Cup anthem ‘Dai Dai’
content: Shakira and Burna Boy’s highly anticipated FIFA World Cup anthem Dai Dai has been released just in time for the 2026 FIFA World Cup. Shakira has become the queen of World Cup anthems, with her song releases for the football tournament. The song, which was unveiled as part of the official FIFA World Cup 2026 campaign , initially debuted at number 114 on Spotify’s Global Songs Chart before completely falling out of the rankings within 24 hours. The sudden drop sparked heated reactions across social media, with many music lovers questioning whether the collaboration had failed to connect with global audiences. Shakira performs during the closing ceremony at Soccer City Stadium in Soweto, ahead of the 2010 FIFA World Cup final between the Netherlands and Spain on 11 July 2010 in Johannesburg, South Africa. Picture: Gallo Images/Foto24/Emile Hendricks “Shakira and Burna Boy’s ‘DAI DAI’ has left Spotify’s Global Songs Chart after just one day,” the page posted. The update immediately triggered comparisons to Shakira’s iconic 2010 FIFA World Cup anthem Waka Waka (This Time for Africa) , which became one of the biggest sports songs in history during South Africa’s unforgettable 2010 tournament. The track forms part of the FIFA Global Citizen Education Fund initiative , which aims to raise US$100 million to improve children’s access to education and football opportunities worldwide. She reportedly pledged royalties from the song towards the campaign, while Sony Music committed to matching the first US$250 000 raised. The anthem also serves as part of the upcoming official FIFA World Cup 2026 album , which includes singles like Lighter , Por Ella , Echo and Illuminate . Adding even more pressure to the rollout, Shakira is also expected to co-headline the historic FIFA World Cup 2026 final halftime show in July, marking the first halftime spectacle in the tournament’s history. Although Dai Dai celebrates football, culture and global unity, early streaming numbers suggest fans may still be emotionally attached to the magic of Waka Waka .

Los Angeles Dodgers acquired a pitcher with a 6.69 ERA, and the reason should worry the rest of the NL
content: The Dodgers acquired Eric Lauer from Toronto on May 17th, and the move makes more sense as a warning than a headline. Los Angeles did not go get Lauer because he fixes the rotation. It went and got him because the club’s rotation margin has nearly disappeared. This is a depth move that became necessary fast Lauer arrived after being designated for assignment by the Blue Jays, carrying a 6.69 ERA and an AL-leading 11 homers allowed in eight appearances. That stat line is not what anyone pictures when thinking about a rotation stabilizer. But that is also the point. The Dodgers were not shopping for ideal. They were shopping for someone who can absorb innings without blowing up the rest of the staff’s workload map. The injuries have changed the roster math Tyler Glasnow and Blake Snell are both hurt, Brusdar Graterol had to be moved to the 60-day injured list to clear space, and the Dodgers are suddenly working with only five active starters on the roster. For a team that normally prefers a six-man rotation, that is a much tighter setup than it wants. The calendar makes it worse. Los Angeles can survive to next Thursday’s off-day, but another longer stretch is coming, and the club is already trying to avoid leaning too hard on bullpen games. River Ryan is not supposed to solve this alone River Ryan is the only other healthy starter on the 40-man roster, and the Dodgers want him to keep building back in Triple-A during his first season after Tommy John surgery. That means the organization needed another arm who could plausibly cover bulk innings without forcing a developmental shortcut elsewhere. Lauer fits that need better than his surface stats suggest, simply because he has been a starter for most of his career and can slide into multiple roles. The real pressure point is late May into mid-June The story around the trade points to a coming stretch of 19 games in 20 days from May 29 through June 17. That is where the current setup starts to look unsustainable if Glasnow is not back. This is why even an unglamorous arm matters. One extra option can prevent two or three different roster problems from piling up at once, especially for a team that already had to piece together a bullpen game on Friday. The move says more about the Dodgers than it does about Lauer Lauer may help, or he may simply cover difficult innings for a few weeks. Either outcome would still tell the same story. The Dodgers needed this move because their usual pitching surplus is gone for...
